22217:     function missionRequirementsEscapeRegex(value) {
22218:         return String(value || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
22219:     }

22221:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
22222:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
22223:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);
22224:         return Number.isFinite(number) ? Math.max(0, number) : 0;
22225:     }
22226: 
22227:     function missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value) {
22228:         const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
22229:         if (!/\d/u.test(text)) return null;
22230:         return missionRequirementsNumber(text);
22231:     }

22233:     function missionRequirementsCapacity(min = 0, max = min, known = null) {
22234:         const safeMin = Math.max(0, Number(min) || 0);
22235:         let safeMax = max === null || max === undefined ? null : Math.max(safeMin, Number(max) || 0);
22236:         if (safeMax !== null && !Number.isFinite(safeMax)) safeMax = null;
22237:         const exact = known === true ? true : known === false ? false : safeMax !== null && safeMin === safeMax;
22238:         return { min: safeMin, max: safeMax, known: exact, value: safeMin };
22239:     }
22240: 
22241:     function missionRequirementsCapacityText(capacity) {
22242:         const value = missionRequirementsCapacity(capacity?.min ?? capacity?.value ?? 0, capacity?.max, capacity?.known);
22243:         if (value.known || value.max === value.min) return value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB');
22244:         if (value.max === null) return value.min > 0 ? `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}+` : '?';
22245:         return `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}–${value.max.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`;
22246:     }

22248:     function missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, selectedCapacity, respondingCapacity, onSiteCapacity = null, requiredCapacity = null) {
22249:         const missing = Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0);
22250:         const selected = missionRequirementsCapacity(selectedCapacity?.min ?? selectedCapacity?.value ?? 0, selectedCapacity?.max, selectedCapacity?.known);
22251:         const responding = missionRequirementsCapacity(respondingCapacity?.min ?? respondingCapacity?.value ?? 0, respondingCapacity?.max, respondingCapacity?.known);
22252:         const onSite = missionRequirementsCapacity(onSiteCapacity?.min ?? onSiteCapacity?.value ?? 0, onSiteCapacity?.max, onSiteCapacity?.known);
22253:         const derivedRequiredMin = missing + onSite.min;
22254:         const derivedRequiredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : missing + onSite.max;
22255:         const required = requiredCapacity
22256:             ? missionRequirementsCapacity(requiredCapacity?.min ?? requiredCapacity?.value ?? derivedRequiredMin, requiredCapacity?.max, requiredCapacity?.known)

22258:         const fulfilledMin = onSite.min + responding.min + selected.min;
22259:         const fulfilledMax = onSite.max === null || responding.max === null || selected.max === null
22260:             ? null
22261:             : onSite.max + responding.max + selected.max;
22262:         const covered = required.max !== null && fulfilledMin >= required.max;
22263:         const definitelyOpen = !covered && fulfilledMax !== null && fulfilledMax < required.min;
22264:         const uncertain = !covered && !definitelyOpen;
22265:         const stillMin = fulfilledMax === null ? 0 : Math.max(0, required.min - fulfilledMax);
22266:         const stillMax = required.max === null ? null : Math.max(0, required.max - fulfilledMin);

22268:         const still = missionRequirementsCapacity(stillMin, stillMax, stillKnown);
22269:         const partial = !covered && fulfilledMin > 0;

22272:             required: required.min,

22355:     function missionRequirementsParseText(rawText, group = 'vehicles') {
22356:         const normalized = String(rawText ?? '')
22357:         .replace(/\r/g, '')
22358:         .replace(/\n+/g, '; ')
22359:         .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22360:         .trim();
22361:         if (!normalized) return { requirements: [], remaining: '' };
22362:         let working = normalized;
22363:         const requirements = [];
22364:         while (true) {
22365:         let best = null;
22366:         for (const definition of MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS) {
22367:             if ((definition.group || 'vehicles') !== group) continue;
22368:             const found = missionRequirementsFindDefinitionMatch(working, definition);
22369:             if (!found) continue;
22370:             if (!best || found.index < best.found.index || (found.index === best.found.index && found.length > best.found.length)) {
22371:                 best = { definition, found };
22372:             }
22373:         }
22374:         if (!best) break;
22375:         requirements.push({
22376:             key: best.definition.key,
22377:             requirement: best.definition.label,
22378:             missing: best.found.missing,
22379:             group,
22380:             definition: best.definition,
22381:             sourceIndex: best.found.index
22382:         });
22383:         working = `${working.slice(0, best.found.index)}${' '.repeat(best.found.length)}${working.slice(best.found.index + best.found.length)}`;
22384:         }
22385:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22386:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });
22387:         return { requirements, remaining: missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(working) };
22388:     }

22390:     function missionRequirementsElementText(element) {
22391:         if (!element) return '';
22392:         const rendered = typeof element.innerText === 'string' && element.innerText.trim()
22393:         ? element.innerText
22394:         : element.textContent;
22395:         return String(rendered || '').replace(/\u00a0/gu, ' ').trim();
22396:     }
22397: 
22398:     function missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(value, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22399:         const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
22400:         if (normalized === 'personnel' || normalized === 'staff') return 'staff';
22401:         if (normalized === 'other' || normalized === 'resource' || normalized === 'resources') return 'other';
22402:         if (normalized === 'vehicle' || normalized === 'vehicles') return 'vehicles';
22403:         return fallback;
22404:     }
22405: 
22406:     function missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22407:         const normalized = String(text || '').toLowerCase();
22408:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+(?:personnel|staff)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22409:         if (/\b(?:officers?|firefighters?|paramedics?|technicians?|commanders?|sergeants?|inspectors?|medics?|advisors?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'staff';
22410:         if (/\b(?:litres?|liters?|water|foam|pumping\s+capacity|resources?)\b/.test(normalized)) return 'other';
22411:         if (/\b(?:missing|required)\s+vehicles?\b/.test(normalized)) return 'vehicles';
22412:         return fallback;
22413:     }
22414: 
22415:     function missionRequirementsStripGroupHeading(text) {
22416:         return String(text || '')
22417:         .replace(/^\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(?:vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/iu, '')
22418:         .trim();
22419:     }
22420: 
22421:     function missionRequirementsSplitTextSections(rawText, fallback = 'vehicles') {
22422:         const text = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim();
22423:         if (!text) return [];
22424:         const heading = /(?:^|[\n;])\s*(?:missing|required)\s+(vehicles?|personnel|staff|other|resources?)\s*:?\s*/giu;
22425:         const matches = Array.from(text.matchAll(heading));
22426:         if (!matches.length) return [{ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(text, fallback), text }];
22427:         const sections = [];
22428:         const prefix = text.slice(0, matches[0].index).trim();
22429:         if (prefix) sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsInferGroup(prefix, fallback), text: prefix });
22430:         matches.forEach((match, index) => {
22431:         const start = match.index + match[0].length;
22432:         const end = index + 1 < matches.length ? matches[index + 1].index : text.length;
22433:         const sectionText = text.slice(start, end).trim();
22434:         if (!sectionText) return;
22435:         sections.push({ group: missionRequirementsNormalizeGroup(match[1], fallback), text: sectionText });
22436:         });
22437:         return sections;
22438:     }

22440:     function missionRequirementsParseGenericText(rawText, group) {
22441:         let working = String(rawText || '').replace(/\r/g, '').replace(/\n+/g, '; ').trim();
22442:         if (!working) return { requirements: [], remaining: '' };
22443:         const number = '(\\d{1,3}(?:[\\s,.]\\d{3})*|\\d+)';
22444:         const patterns = [
22445:         {
22446:             expression: new RegExp(`(^|[,;]\\s*)\\s*(?:at\\s+least\\s+)?(?:x\\s*)?${number}\\s*(?:x\\s*)?\\s+([^,;]+?)(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))`, 'giu'),
22447:             quantity: 2,
22448:             label: 3
22449:         },
22450:         {
22451:             expression: new RegExp(`(^|[,;]\\s*)\\s*([^,;:]+?)\\s*(?::|x)\\s*${number}(?=\\s*(?:[,;]|$))`, 'giu'),
22452:             quantity: 3,
22453:             label: 2
22454:         }
22455:         ];
22456:         const requirements = [];
22457:         let serial = 0;
22458:         for (const pattern of patterns) {
22459:         pattern.expression.lastIndex = 0;
22460:         let match;
22461:         while ((match = pattern.expression.exec(working))) {
22462:             const missing = missionRequirementsNumber(match[pattern.quantity]);
22463:             const label = String(match[pattern.label] || '')
22464:                 .replace(/^\s*(?:and\s+)?(?:missing|required)\s+/iu, '')
22465:                 .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
22466:                 .trim();
22467:             if (!missing || !label) continue;
22468:             const sourceIndex = match.index;
22469:             const slug = label.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '').slice(0, 48) || 'requirement';
22470:             requirements.push({
22471:                 key: `unmapped-${slug}-${serial++}`,
22472:                 requirement: label,
22473:                 missing,
22474:                 group,
22475:                 definition: { key: `unmapped-${slug}`, label, aliases: [label], group, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false, generic: true },
22476:                 sourceIndex
22477:             });
22478:             working = `${working.slice(0, sourceIndex)}${' '.repeat(match[0].length)}${working.slice(sourceIndex + match[0].length)}`;
22479:             pattern.expression.lastIndex = sourceIndex + match[0].length;
22480:         }
22481:         }
22482:         requirements.sort((a, b) => a.sourceIndex - b.sourceIndex);
22483:         requirements.forEach(requirement => { delete requirement.sourceIndex; });
22484:         return { requirements, remaining: missionRequirementsCleanRemaining(working) };
22485:     }

22496:         const generic = missionRequirementsParseGenericText(parsed.remaining, group);
22497:         requirements.push(...generic.requirements);
22498:         if (generic.remaining) unresolved.push({ group, text: generic.remaining });
22499:         };

22508:             const rawGroup = element.getAttribute?.('data-requirement-type') || element.dataset?.requirementType || 'vehicles';

22495:         requirements.push(...parsed.requirements);
22496:         const generic = missionRequirementsParseGenericText(parsed.remaining, group);
22497:         requirements.push(...generic.requirements);
22498:         if (generic.remaining) unresolved.push({ group, text: generic.remaining });
22499:         };

22503:         const closest = element.closest?.('#missing_text');

missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.get(key) : null; const age = snapshot ? now - (Number(snapshot.updatedAt) || 0) : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY; if (snapshot?.state && age >= 0 && age < MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS) { if (record && !record.patientTransitionTimer) { const wait = Math.max(20, MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_PATIENT_TRANSITION_MS - age + 20); record.patientTransitionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { record.patientTransitionTimer = null; missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); }, wait); } return { ...snapshot.state, missionIdentity, transitional: true }; } if (key && snapshot) missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.delete(key); if (record?.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer); if (record) record.patientTransitionTimer = null; return { ...current, missionIdentity, transitional: false }; } function missionRequirementsReconcilePatientDemand(parsed, patientState) { const requirements = Array.from(parsed?.requirements || []).map(requirement => ({ ...requirement })); const unresolved = Array.from(parsed?.unresolved || []).map(item => ({ ...item })); const ambulanceDefinition = MISSION_REQUIREMENT_DEFINITIONS.find(definition => definition.key === 'ambulance'); const ambulanceIndexes = requirements.map((requirement, index) => requirement.key === 'ambulance' ? 23292:     function missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) {
23293:         const missionSelector = '#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
23294:         const windowSelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-body, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
23295:         const nodes = [candidate?.source, candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
23296:         const missionWithin = node => {
23297:             if (!node) return null;
23298:             if (node.matches?.(missionSelector)) return node;
23299:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23300:             if (closest) return closest;
23301:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23302:         };
23303:         for (const node of nodes) {
23304:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23305:             if (mission) return mission;
23306:         }
23307:         for (const node of nodes) {
23308:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23309:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;
23310:         }
23311:         for (const node of nodes) {
23312:             try {
23313:                 const frame = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
23314:                 if (!frame) continue;
23315:                 const frameMission = missionWithin(frame);
23316:                 if (frameMission) return frameMission;
23317:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23318:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23319:             } catch (err) {}
23320:         }
23321:         return candidate?.root || candidate?.mount || candidate?.source || null;
23322:     }

23431:     function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc) {
23432:         if (!doc?.createElement) return;
23433:         const requirementsDocumentStyleId = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId;
23434:         let style = doc.getElementById?.(requirementsDocumentStyleId);
23435:         if (!style) {
23436:             style = doc.createElement('style');
23437:             style.id = requirementsDocumentStyleId;
23438:             (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
23439:         }
23440:         const css = missionRequirementsDocumentCss();
23441:         if (style.textContent !== css) style.textContent = css;
23442:     }

23444:     function missionRequirementsHideSource(source) {
23445:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden === '1') return;
23446:         source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden = '1';
23447:     }
23448: 
23449:     function missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source) {
23450:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden !== '1') return;
23451:         delete source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden;
23452:     }

23454:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23455:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23456:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23457:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23458:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23459:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23460:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23461:         return 'standard';
23462:     }

23464:     function missionRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, unresolved) {
23465:         const definiteOutstanding = rows.filter(row => row.definitelyOpen).length;
23466:         const uncertain = rows.filter(row => row.uncertain).length + unresolved.length;
23467:         const fulfilled = rows.filter(row => row.covered).length;
23468:         const stateName = missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved);
23469:         const summary = stateName === 'success'
23470:             ? `All ${rows.length} covered`
23471:             : stateName === 'warning'

23299:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23300:             if (closest) return closest;
23301:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23302:         };

23304:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23305:             if (mission) return mission;
23306:         }

23308:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23309:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;

23324:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23325:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23326:         if (!root?.querySelector) return false;
23327:         if (missionRequirementsMissionIdentity({ ...candidate, root }, missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root })) > 0) return true;
23328:         if (root.matches?.('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) return true;
23329:         return Boolean(root.querySelector('#vehicle_show_table_body_all, #mission_vehicle_driving, .vehicle_checkbox, [mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id]'));
23330:     }

23333:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23352:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23355:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23362:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();
23366:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23367:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });
23373:     }

23431:     function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc) {
23432:         if (!doc?.createElement) return;
23433:         const requirementsDocumentStyleId = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId;
23434:         let style = doc.getElementById?.(requirementsDocumentStyleId);
23435:         if (!style) {
23436:             style = doc.createElement('style');
23437:             style.id = requirementsDocumentStyleId;
23438:             (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
23439:         }
23440:         const css = missionRequirementsDocumentCss();
23441:         if (style.textContent !== css) style.textContent = css;
23442:     }

23444:     function missionRequirementsHideSource(source) {
23445:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden === '1') return;
23446:         source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden = '1';
23447:     }
23448: 
23449:     function missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source) {
23450:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden !== '1') return;
23451:         delete source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden;
23452:     }
23453: 
23454:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23455:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23456:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23457:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23458:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23459:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23460:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23461:         return 'standard';
23462:     }
23463: 
23464:     function missionRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, unresolved) {
23465:         const definiteOutstanding = rows.filter(row => row.definitelyOpen).length;
23466:         const uncertain = rows.filter(row => row.uncertain).length + unresolved.length;
23467:         const fulfilled = rows.filter(row => row.covered).length;
23468:         const stateName = missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved);
23469:         const summary = stateName === 'success'
23470:             ? `All ${rows.length} covered`
23471:             : stateName === 'warning'
23472:                 ? `${uncertain} need confirmation · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`
23473:                 : `${definiteOutstanding} outstanding · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`;
23474:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => {
23475:             const rowState = row.covered ? 'covered' : row.uncertain ? 'unresolved' : row.partial ? 'partial' : 'open';
23476:             const prefix = row.covered ? '✓ ' : '';
23477:             const requiredText = row.requiredText || (Number.isFinite(Number(row.missing)) ? Number(row.missing).toLocaleString('en-GB') : '?');

23332:     function missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime(){try{return!pageWindow.top||pageWindow.top===pageWindow}catch{return true}}
23333:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23352:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23355:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23362:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();
23366:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23367:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });
23373:     }

23431:     function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc) {
23432:         if (!doc?.createElement) return;
23433:         const requirementsDocumentStyleId = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId;
23434:         let style = doc.getElementById?.(requirementsDocumentStyleId);
23435:         if (!style) {
23436:             style = doc.createElement('style');
23437:             style.id = requirementsDocumentStyleId;
23438:             (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
23439:         }
23440:         const css = missionRequirementsDocumentCss();
23441:         if (style.textContent !== css) style.textContent = css;
23442:     }

23444:     function missionRequirementsHideSource(source) {
23445:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden === '1') return;
23446:         source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden = '1';
23447:     }

23449:     function missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source) {
23450:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden !== '1') return;
23451:         delete source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden;
23452:     }

23454:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23455:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23456:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23457:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23458:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23459:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23460:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23461:         return 'standard';
23462:     }
23463: 
23464:     function missionRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, unresolved) {
23465:         const definiteOutstanding = rows.filter(row => row.definitelyOpen).length;
23466:         const uncertain = rows.filter(row => row.uncertain).length + unresolved.length;
23467:         const fulfilled = rows.filter(row => row.covered).length;
23468:         const stateName = missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved);
23469:         const summary = stateName === 'success'
23470:             ? `All ${rows.length} covered`
23471:             : stateName === 'warning'
23472:                 ? `${uncertain} need confirmation · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`
23473:                 : `${definiteOutstanding} outstanding · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`;
23474:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => {
23475:             const rowState = row.covered ? 'covered' : row.uncertain ? 'unresolved' : row.partial ? 'partial' : 'open';
23476:             const prefix = row.covered ? '✓ ' : '';
23477:             const requiredText = row.requiredText || (Number.isFinite(Number(row.missing)) ? Number(row.missing).toLocaleString('en-GB') : '?');
23478:             const onSiteText = row.onSiteText || '?';
23479:             const respondingText = row.respondingText || row.enRouteText || '?';
23480:             const selectedText = row.selectedText || '?';
23481:             const stillText = row.stillNeededText || '?';
23482:             const status = row.covered ? 'fulfilled' : row.uncertain ? 'requires confirmation' : row.partial ? 'partially fulfilled' : 'outstanding';
23483:             const sourceBadge = row.requirementSource ? `<small class="mcms-req-source">${escapeHtml(row.requirementSource)}</small>` : '';
23484:             return `<tr data-row-state="${rowState}" title="${escapeHtml(`${row.requirement}: ${status}`)}"><td><span>${escapeHtml(prefix + row.requirement)}</span>${sourceBadge}</td><td data-label="Required">${escapeHtml(requiredText)}</td><td data-label="On site">${escapeHtml(onSiteText)}</td><td data-label="Respond.">${escapeHtml(respondingText)}</td><td data-label="Selected">${escapeHtml(selectedText)}</td><td class="mcms-req-still" data-label="Need">${escapeHtml(stillText)}</td></tr>`;
23485:         }).join('');
23486:         const unknownHtml = unresolved.length
23487:             ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unresolved MissionChief requirement</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(item.text)}</span>`).join('')}<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button></div>`
23488:             : '';
23489:         return {
23490:             stateName,
23491:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
23492:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body"><table aria-label="Live mission requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Required</th><th scope="col">On site</th><th scope="col">Responding</th><th scope="col">Selected</th><th scope="col">Still needed</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>${unknownHtml}</div>`
23493:         };
23494:     }
23495: 
23496:     function missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(value, limit = 600) {
23497:         let text = Array.from(String(value ?? ''), ch => { const code = ch.charCodeAt(0); return code < 32 || code === 127 ? ' ' : ch; }).join('').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
23498:         text = text
23499:             .replace(/https?:\/\/(?:discord(?:app)?\.com\/api\/webhooks|[^\s/]+\/webhooks)\/\S+/gi, '[redacted webhook]')
23500:             .replace(/\b(?:csrf|authenticity|authorization|session|cookie|token|password|secret|api[_-]?key)\b\s*[:=]\s*[^\s,;]+/gi, match => `${match.split(/[:=]/)[0]}: [redacted]`)
23501:             .replace(/\b[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}\b/gi, '[redacted email]')
23502:             .replace(/-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}\s*[,/]\s*-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}/g, '[redacted coordinates]');
23503:         return text.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit));
23504:     }

23506:     function missionRequirementsTypeSummary(units) {
23507:         const counts = new Map();
23508:         for (const unit of units || []) if (Number.isFinite(unit?.typeId) && unit.typeId >= 0) counts.set(unit.typeId, (counts.get(unit.typeId) || 0) + 1);
23509:         return Array.from(counts.entries()).sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]).map(([type, count]) => `${type}×${count}`).join(', ') || 'None detected';
23510:     }

23493:         };

23501:             .replace(/\b[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}\b/gi, '[redacted email]')
23502:             .replace(/-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}\s*[,/]\s*-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}/g, '[redacted coordinates]');

23518:     function missionRequirementsReportUrl(record, reason = 'unknown') {
23519:         const candidate = record?.candidate || {};
23520:         const source = record?.source;
23521:         const root = candidate.root || candidate.mount;
23522:         const doc = source?.ownerDocument || root?.ownerDocument;
23523:         const view = doc?.defaultView || pageWindow;
23524:         const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, source) || 'Unknown';
23525:         const title = missionRequirementsMissionTitle(record);
23526:         const missionType = missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate);
23527:         const raw = source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? '' : missionRequirementsElementText(source);
23528:         let parsed = { requirements: [], unresolved: [] };
23529:         try { if (raw) parsed = missionRequirementsParseSource(source); } catch (err) {}
23530:         missionRequirementsCatalogueEnsure(record);
23531:         const selected = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'selected');
23532:         const responding = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'responding');
23533:         const onSite = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'onsite');
23534:         const classes = Array.from(source?.classList || []).filter(value => /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,40}$/.test(value)).slice(0, 8).join(' ');
23535:         const count = selector => { try { return root?.querySelectorAll?.(selector)?.length || 0; } catch (err) { return 0; } };
23536:         const platform = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(view?.navigator?.userAgentData?.platform || view?.navigator?.platform || 'Unknown', 80);
23537:         const mobile = view?.navigator?.userAgentData?.mobile === true ? 'yes' : 'no/unknown';
23538:         const path = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(view?.location?.pathname || '', 180);
23539:         const mode = state.uiMode || state.operatingMode || (Number(view?.innerWidth) <= 767 ? 'mobile' : Number(view?.innerWidth) <= 1180 ? 'tablet' : 'desktop');
23540:         const fields = [
23541:             '## Automatically harvested Mission Requirements diagnostic',
23542:             '',
23543:             '> Review this report before submitting. No GitHub token, cookies, chat, coordinates, addresses, vehicle IDs or authentication data are included.',
23544:             '',
23545:             `- **Failure reason:** ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(reason, 120) || 'Unknown'}`,
23546:             `- **Mission ID:** ${missionId}`,
23547:             `- **Mission title:** ${title || 'Unavailable'}`,
23548:             `- **Mission type ID:** ${missionType ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23549:             `- **MissionChief path:** ${path || 'Unavailable'}`,
23550:             `- **Toolkit version:** ${SCRIPT.version}`,
23551:             `- **Layout:** ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(mode, 40)}`,
23552:             `- **Viewport:** ${Number(view?.innerWidth) || 0}×${Number(view?.innerHeight) || 0}`,
23553:             `- **Platform:** ${platform}; mobile=${mobile}`,
23554:             '',
23555:             '### Requirement source',
23556:             `- Present: ${source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 'No' : 'Yes'}`,
23557:             `- Element: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(source?.tagName || 'Unavailable', 30)}#${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(source?.id || '', 60)}`,
23558:             `- Classes: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(classes, 180) || 'None'}`,
23559:             `- Typed groups: ${count('[data-requirement-type]')}`,
23560:             `- Parsed rows: ${parsed.requirements.length}`,
23561:             `- Unresolved fragments: ${parsed.unresolved.length}`,
23562:             '',
23563:             ...missionRequirementsCatalogueDiagnosticLines(record, parsed),
23564:             '### Native selector counts',
23565:             `- missing_text: ${count('#missing_text')}`,
23566:             `- selected checkboxes: ${count('.vehicle_checkbox:checked')}`,
23567:             `- responding rows: ${count('#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr')}`,
23568:             `- on-site rows: ${count('#mission_vehicle_at_mission tbody tr')}`,
23569:             `- patient summary nodes: ${count('#patient_button_form, #patient_button_text')}`,
23570:             `- patient state: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(JSON.stringify(missionRequirementsPatientCount(candidate)), 240)}`,
23571:             `- selected vehicle types: ${missionRequirementsTypeSummary(selected)}`,
23572:             `- responding vehicle types: ${missionRequirementsTypeSummary(responding)}`,
23573:             `- on-site vehicle types: ${missionRequirementsTypeSummary(onSite)}`,
23574:             '',
23575:             '### Visible requirement text',
23576:             '```text',
23577:             missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(raw, 1200) || 'Unavailable',
23578:             '```'
23579:         ];
23580:         const issueTitle = `Mission requirements missing: ${title || `Mission ${missionId}`}`.slice(0, 180);
23581:         let body = fields.join('\n');
23582:         const build = () => {
23583:             const params = new URLSearchParams({ template: 'mission-info-missing.yml', title: issueTitle, diagnostic: body });
23584:             return `https://github.com/Conroy1988/missionchief-toolkit-assets/issues/new?${params.toString()}`;
23585:         };
23586:         let url = build();
23587:         while (url.length > 7600 && body.length > 1800) {
23588:             body = `${body.slice(0, Math.max(1500, body.length - 500))}\n\n_Report shortened to fit GitHub's issue URL limit._`;
23589:             url = build();
23590:         }
23591:         return url;
23592:     }
23593:     function missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(kind) {
23594:         const loading = kind === 'loading';
23595:         const empty = kind === 'empty';
23596:         const message = loading ? 'Loading mission requirements…' : empty ? 'No outstanding requirements reported by MissionChief.' : 'Unable to pull mission requirements';
23597:         const summary = loading ? 'Loading' : empty ? 'No outstanding requirements' : 'Requirements unavailable';
23598:         const report = loading || empty ? '' : '<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button>';
23599:         return { stateName: 'warning', html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${summary}</span></div><div class="mcms-req-fallback"><span class="mcms-req-fallback-message">${message}</span>${report}</div>` };
23600:     }

23602:     function missionRequirementsPresent(record, presentation, reason = '') {
23603:         record.panel.dataset.state = presentation.stateName;
23604:         record.panel.dataset.mcmsTheme = state.uiTheme;

23174:     function missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, node) {
23175:         let current = node;
23176:         while (current?.parentNode && current.parentNode !== root) current = current.parentNode;
23177:         return current?.parentNode === root ? current : node;
23178:     }

23180:     function missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(node, boundary = null) {
23181:         const unsafeTags = new Set(['TABLE', 'THEAD', 'TBODY', 'TFOOT', 'TR', 'TD', 'TH', 'COLGROUP']);
23182:         let current = node;
23183:         while (current && current !== boundary) {
23184:             if (unsafeTags.has(String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase())) return true;
23185:             current = current.parentNode;
23186:         }
23187:         return false;
23188:     }

23190:     function missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, node) {
23191:         if (!root || !node) return null;
23192:         let target = node;
23193:         let current = node;
23194:         while (current && current !== root) {
23195:             if (String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase() === 'TABLE') target = current;
23196:             current = current.parentNode;
23197:         }
23198:         const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, target);
23199:         const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23200:         if (!parent || missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(parent, root?.parentNode || null)) {
23201:             return { root, parent: root, before: root.firstChild || null };
23202:         }
23203:         return { root, parent, before: block };
23204:     }

23209:         const native = root.matches?.('#missing_text') ? root : root.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
23210:         const explicit = native || (missionRequirementsExplicitSource(source) && source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') !== '1' ? source : null);
23211:         if (explicit?.parentNode) return missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(explicit.parentNode, root?.parentNode || null)
23212:             ? missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, explicit)
23213:             : { root, parent: explicit.parentNode, before: explicit };

23215:         const title = root.querySelector?.('#mission_caption, #mission_name, [data-mission-title], .mission-title, .mission_caption, h1');
23216:         const header = address || title;
23217:         if (header) {
23218:             const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, header);
23219:             const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23220:             const siblings = Array.from(parent.children || []);
23221:             const index = siblings.indexOf(block);
23222:             return { root, parent, before: index >= 0 ? (siblings[index + 1] || null) : (block?.nextSibling || null) };
23223:         }
23224:         // Operational regions may load before the mission header during AJAX dispatch.
23225:         // They remain data sources only and are never valid panel hosts.
23226:         return null;

23229:     function missionRequirementsPlacePanel(candidate, source, panel) {
23230:         const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source);
23231:         if (!placement?.parent || !panel) return false;
23232:         const siblings = Array.from(placement.parent.children || []);
23233:         const panelIndex = siblings.indexOf(panel);
23234:         const beforeIndex = placement.before ? siblings.indexOf(placement.before) : siblings.length;
23235:         if (panel.parentNode !== placement.parent || panelIndex < 0 || panelIndex !== beforeIndex - 1) {
23236:             placement.parent.insertBefore?.(panel, placement.before || null);
23237:         }
23238:         return true;
23239:     }

23241:     function missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) {
23242:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root;
23243:         const supplied = candidate?.source;
23244:         const native = root?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? root : root?.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
23245:         if (native && native.isConnected !== false) return native;

23247:             const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement({ ...candidate, root, mount: root }, supplied);
23248:             if (placement?.parent) return supplied;
23249:             supplied.remove?.();
23250:         }

23272:     function missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate) {
23273:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount;
23274:         if (!root?.ownerDocument?.createElement) return null;
23275:         let anchor = Array.from(root.children || []).find(node => node?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1')
23276:             || root.querySelector?.('[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]');
23277:         const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23278:         if (!placement?.parent) {
23279:             anchor?.remove?.();
23280:             return null;
23281:         }
23282:         if (!anchor || anchor.isConnected === false) {
23283:             anchor = root.ownerDocument.createElement('span');
23284:             anchor.hidden = true;
23285:             anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
23286:             anchor.setAttribute('data-mcms-requirements-anchor', '1');
23287:         }
23288:         placement.parent.insertBefore?.(anchor, placement.before || null);
23289:         return anchor;
23290:     }

23292:     function missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) {
23293:         const missionSelector = '#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
23294:         const windowSelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-body, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
23295:         const nodes = [candidate?.source, candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
23296:         const missionWithin = node => {
23297:             if (!node) return null;
23298:             if (node.matches?.(missionSelector)) return node;
23299:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23300:             if (closest) return closest;
23301:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23302:         };
23303:         for (const node of nodes) {
23304:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23305:             if (mission) return mission;
23306:         }
23307:         for (const node of nodes) {
23308:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23309:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;
23310:         }
23311:         for (const node of nodes) {
23312:             try {
23313:                 const frame = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
23314:                 if (!frame) continue;
23315:                 const frameMission = missionWithin(frame);
23316:                 if (frameMission) return frameMission;
23317:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23318:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23319:             } catch (err) {}
23320:         }
23321:         return candidate?.root || candidate?.mount || candidate?.source || null;
23322:     }

23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);

23359:             const source = candidate?.source;

23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)

23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();

23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });

23317:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23318:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23319:             } catch (err) {}
23320:         }

23322:     }

23324:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23325:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23326:         if (!root?.querySelector) return false;
23327:         if (missionRequirementsMissionIdentity({ ...candidate, root }, missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root })) > 0) return true;
23328:         if (root.matches?.('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) return true;

23332:     function missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime(){try{return!pageWindow.top||pageWindow.top===pageWindow}catch{return true}}
23333:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23352:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23355:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23362:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();
23366:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23367:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });
23373:     }

23272:     function missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate) {
23273:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount;
23274:         if (!root?.ownerDocument?.createElement) return null;
23275:         let anchor = Array.from(root.children || []).find(node => node?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1')
23276:             || root.querySelector?.('[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]');
23277:         const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23278:         if (!placement?.parent) {
23279:             anchor?.remove?.();
23280:             return null;
23281:         }
23282:         if (!anchor || anchor.isConnected === false) {
23283:             anchor = root.ownerDocument.createElement('span');
23284:             anchor.hidden = true;
23285:             anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
23286:             anchor.setAttribute('data-mcms-requirements-anchor', '1');
23287:         }
23288:         placement.parent.insertBefore?.(anchor, placement.before || null);
23289:         return anchor;
23290:     }

23292:     function missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) {
23293:         const missionSelector = '#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
23294:         const windowSelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-body, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
23295:         const nodes = [candidate?.source, candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
23296:         const missionWithin = node => {
23297:             if (!node) return null;
23298:             if (node.matches?.(missionSelector)) return node;
23299:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23300:             if (closest) return closest;
23301:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23302:         };
23303:         for (const node of nodes) {
23304:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23305:             if (mission) return mission;
23306:         }
23307:         for (const node of nodes) {
23308:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23309:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;
23310:         }
23311:         for (const node of nodes) {
23312:             try {
23313:                 const frame = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
23314:                 if (!frame) continue;
23315:                 const frameMission = missionWithin(frame);
23316:                 if (frameMission) return frameMission;
23317:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23318:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23319:             } catch (err) {}
23320:         }
23321:         return candidate?.root || candidate?.mount || candidate?.source || null;
23322:     }

23431:     function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc) {
23432:         if (!doc?.createElement) return;
23433:         const requirementsDocumentStyleId = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId;
23434:         let style = doc.getElementById?.(requirementsDocumentStyleId);
23435:         if (!style) {
23436:             style = doc.createElement('style');

23292:     function missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) {
23293:         const missionSelector = '#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
23294:         const windowSelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-body, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
23295:         const nodes = [candidate?.source, candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
23296:         const missionWithin = node => {
23297:             if (!node) return null;
23298:             if (node.matches?.(missionSelector)) return node;
23299:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23300:             if (closest) return closest;
23301:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23302:         };
23303:         for (const node of nodes) {
23304:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23305:             if (mission) return mission;
23306:         }
23307:         for (const node of nodes) {
23308:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23309:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;
23310:         }
23311:         for (const node of nodes) {
23312:             try {
23313:                 const frame = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
23314:                 if (!frame) continue;
23315:                 const frameMission = missionWithin(frame);
23316:                 if (frameMission) return frameMission;
23317:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23318:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23319:             } catch (err) {}
23320:         }
23321:         return candidate?.root || candidate?.mount || candidate?.source || null;
23322:     }
23323: 
23324:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23325:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23326:         if (!root?.querySelector) return false;
23327:         if (missionRequirementsMissionIdentity({ ...candidate, root }, missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root })) > 0) return true;
23328:         if (root.matches?.('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) return true;
23329:         return Boolean(root.querySelector('#vehicle_show_table_body_all, #mission_vehicle_driving, .vehicle_checkbox, [mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id]'));
23330:     }

23333:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23352:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23355:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23362:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();
23366:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23367:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });
23373:     }

23431:     function ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc) {
23432:         if (!doc?.createElement) return;
23433:         const requirementsDocumentStyleId = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsDocumentStyleId;
23434:         let style = doc.getElementById?.(requirementsDocumentStyleId);
23435:         if (!style) {
23436:             style = doc.createElement('style');
23437:             style.id = requirementsDocumentStyleId;
23438:             (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
23439:         }
23440:         const css = missionRequirementsDocumentCss();
23441:         if (style.textContent !== css) style.textContent = css;
23442:     }

23444:     function missionRequirementsHideSource(source) {
23445:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden === '1') return;
23446:         source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden = '1';
23447:     }
23448: 
23449:     function missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source) {
23450:         if (!source || source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden !== '1') return;
23451:         delete source.dataset.mcmsRequirementsSourceHidden;
23452:     }

23454:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23455:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23456:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23457:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23458:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23459:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23460:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23461:         return 'standard';
23462:     }

23324:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23325:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);

23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23352:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23355:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23362:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();
23366:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23367:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });
23373:     }

23454:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23455:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23456:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23457:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23458:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23459:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23460:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23461:         return 'standard';
23462:     }

22804:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(candidate) {
22805:         const scopes = [candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
22806:         let matched = null;
22807:         for (const scope of scopes) {
22808:             const links = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll?.('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]') || []);
22809:             for (const link of links) {
22810:                 const href = String(link.getAttribute?.('href') || link.href || '');
22811:                 const match = href.match(/\/einsaetze\/(\d+)(?:\?[^#]*\boverlay_index=(\d+))?/iu);
22812:                 if (!match) continue;
22813:                 matched = { id: Number(match[1]), overlayIndex: match[2] === undefined ? null : Number(match[2]) };
22814:                 break;
22815:             }
22816:             if (matched) break;
22817:         }
22818:         if (!matched) {
22819:             const id = missionRequirementsMissionTypeId(candidate);
22820:             if (id === null || id === undefined || !Number.isFinite(Number(id)) || Number(id) < 0) return null;
22821:             matched = { id: Number(id), overlayIndex: null };
22822:         }
22823:         const doc = candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || candidate?.mount?.ownerDocument;
22824:         const location = doc?.defaultView?.location || pageWindow.location || {};
22825:         const origin = location.origin || `${location.protocol || 'https:'}//${location.host || 'www.missionchief.co.uk'}`;
22826:         const path = `/einsaetze/${matched.id}${matched.overlayIndex === null ? '' : `?overlay_index=${matched.overlayIndex}`}`;
22827:         return { ...matched, origin, path, url: `${origin}${path}`, key: `${origin}${path}` };
22828:     }
22829: 
22830:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value) {
22831:         const rawLabel = missionRequirementsCatalogueText({ textContent: label });
22832:         const rawValue = missionRequirementsCatalogueText({ textContent: value });
22833:         const quantityMatch = rawValue.match(/^\s*(\d+(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)/u);
22834:         const quantity = quantityMatch ? missionRequirementsNumber(quantityMatch[1]) : null;
22835:         if (quantity === null) return null;
22836:         const cleanedLabel = rawLabel
22837:             .replace(/^(?:required|requirement\s+of|needed)\s+/iu, '')
22838:             .replace(/\s*\([^)]*%[^)]*\)\s*$/u, '')
22839:             .trim();
22840:         if (!cleanedLabel) return null;
22841:         const probabilityMatch = `${rawLabel} ${rawValue}`.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*%/u);
22842:         const probability = probabilityMatch ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(probabilityMatch[1]))) : 100;
22843:         const sourceText = `${quantity} ${cleanedLabel}`;
22844:         for (const group of ['vehicles', 'staff', 'other']) {
22845:             const parsed = missionRequirementsParseText(sourceText, group);
22846:             if (!parsed.requirements.length) continue;
22847:             const requirement = parsed.requirements[0];
22848:             return {
22849:                 ...requirement,
22850:                 missing: quantity,
22851:                 baseline: quantity,
22852:                 baselineText: `${quantity.toLocaleString('en-GB')}${probability < 100 ? ` (${probability}% chance)` : ''}`,
22853:                 probability,
22854:                 catalogueLabel: rawLabel,
22855:                 catalogueValue: rawValue,
22856:                 catalogueKnown: true
22857:             };
22858:         }
22859:         const inferredGroup = missionRequirementsInferGroup(cleanedLabel, 'vehicles');
22860:         const key = `catalogue-${cleanedLabel.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gu, '-').replace(/^-|-$/gu, '').slice(0, 70) || 'unknown'}`;
22861:         return {
22862:             key,
22863:             requirement: cleanedLabel,
22864:             missing: quantity,
22865:             baseline: quantity,
22866:             baselineText: `${quantity.toLocaleString('en-GB')}${probability < 100 ? ` (${probability}% chance)` : ''}`,
22867:             probability,
22868:             group: inferredGroup,
22869:             definition: { key, label: cleanedLabel, aliases: [cleanedLabel], group: inferredGroup, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false },
22870:             catalogueLabel: rawLabel,
22871:             catalogueValue: rawValue,
22872:             catalogueKnown: false
22873:         };
22874:     }
22875: 
22876:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(doc, descriptor = {}) {
22877:         if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) throw new Error('catalogue document unavailable');
22878:         const requirements = [];
22879:         const unresolved = [];
22880:         const preconditions = {};
22881:         const other = {};
22882:         const tables = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('table') || []);
22883:         for (const table of tables) {
22884:             const tableText = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(table);
22885:             let kind = /Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements/iu.test(tableText) ? 'requirements'
22886:                 : /Reward\s+and\s+Precondition/iu.test(tableText) ? 'preconditions'
22887:                     : /Other\s+information/iu.test(tableText) ? 'other' : null;
22888:             const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll?.('tr') || []);
22889:             for (const row of rows) {
22890:                 const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll?.('th, td') || []);
22891:                 if (cells.length < 2) continue;
22892:                 const label = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[0]);
22893:                 const value = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[1]);
22894:                 if (!label || /^(?:Value|Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements|Reward\s+and\s+Precondition|Other\s+information)$/iu.test(label)) continue;
22895:                 if (!kind && /^(?:Required|Requirement\s+of|Needed)\b/iu.test(label)) kind = 'requirements';
22896:                 if (kind === 'requirements') {
22897:                     const parsed = missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value);
22898:                     if (parsed) requirements.push(parsed);
22899:                     else unresolved.push({ label, value });
22900:                 } else if (kind === 'preconditions') {
22901:                     preconditions[label] = value;
22902:                 } else if (kind === 'other') {
22903:                     other[label] = value;
22904:                 }
22905:             }
22906:         }
22907:         const titleNode = doc.querySelector?.('h1, [data-mission-title], .mission-title');
22908:         const title = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(missionRequirementsCatalogueText(titleNode), 140) || `Mission ${descriptor.id ?? 'Unknown'}`;
22909:         const variationLinks = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]') || []);
22910:         const seenVariations = new Set();
22911:         const variations = [];
22912:         for (const link of variationLinks) {
22913:             const href = String(link.getAttribute?.('href') || link.href || '');
22914:             if (!/\/einsaetze\/\d+/u.test(href) || seenVariations.has(href)) continue;
22915:             seenVariations.add(href);
22916:             variations.push({ href: missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(href, 180), title: missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(missionRequirementsCatalogueText(link), 140) });
22917:         }
22918:         const findValue = (source, pattern) => {
22919:             const entry = Object.entries(source).find(([key]) => pattern.test(key));
22920:             return entry ? entry[1] : '';
22921:         };
22922:         return {
22923:             id: descriptor.id ?? null,
22924:             overlayIndex: descriptor.overlayIndex ?? null,
22925:             path: descriptor.path || '',
22926:             url: descriptor.url || '',
22927:             title,
22928:             requirements,
22929:             unresolved,
22930:             preconditions,
22931:             other,
22932:             averageCredits: missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(findValue(preconditions, /Average\s+credits/iu)),
22933:             maxPatients: missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(findValue(other, /Max\.?\s*Patients/iu)),
22934:             patientTransportProbability: missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(findValue(other, /Probability.*transport/iu)),
22935:             variations,
22936:             fetchedAt: Date.now(),
22937:             stale: false
22938:         };
22939:     }
22940: 
22941:     function missionRequirementsCataloguePrune() {
22942:         if (missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size <= MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) return;
22943:         const ordered = Array.from(missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.entries()).sort((a, b) => (a[1]?.touchedAt || 0) - (b[1]?.touchedAt || 0));
22944:         while (ordered.length && missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size > MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) {
22945:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(ordered.shift()[0]);
22946:         }
22947:     }
22948:

22944:         while (ordered.length && missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.size > MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_CACHE_LIMIT) {
22945:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(ordered.shift()[0]);
22946:         }
22947:     }
