22949:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheStore(key, value, now = Date.now()) {
22950:         missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.set(key, {
22951:             value,
22952:             expiresAt: now + MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_TTL_MS,
22953:             staleUntil: now + MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_STALE_MS,
22954:             retryAt: 0,
22955:             promise: null,
22956:             touchedAt: now
22957:         });
22958:         missionRequirementsCataloguePrune();
22959:         return value;
22960:     }
22961: 
22962:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(key, now = Date.now()) {
22963:         const entry = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(key);
22964:         if (!entry?.value) return null;
22965:         if (now > entry.staleUntil) {
22966:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(key);
22967:             return null;
22968:         }
22969:         entry.touchedAt = now;
22970:         return { value: entry.value, stale: now > entry.expiresAt };
22971:     }
22972: 
22973:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueFailureFallback(key, now = Date.now()) {
22974:         return missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(key, now);
22975:     }
22976: 
22977:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueEnsure(record) {
22978:         const descriptor = missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(record?.candidate);
22979:         const previousKey = record?.catalogueDescriptor?.key || '';
22980:         const nextKey = descriptor?.key || '';
22981:         if (previousKey !== nextKey) {
22982:             record.catalogueRequestToken = (Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0) + 1;
22983:             record.catalogue = null;
22984:             record.catalogueState = nextKey ? 'idle' : 'unavailable';
22985:             record.catalogueError = '';
22986:         }
22987:         record.catalogueDescriptor = descriptor;
22988:         const requestToken = Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0;
22989:         const stillCurrent = () => record?.catalogueDescriptor?.key === descriptor?.key && (Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0) === requestToken;
22990:         if (!descriptor) {
22991:             record.catalogueState = 'unavailable';
22992:             return null;
22993:         }
22994:         const now = Date.now();
22995:         const cached = missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(descriptor.key, now);
22996:         if (cached) {
22997:             record.catalogue = { ...cached.value, stale: cached.stale };
22998:             record.catalogueState = cached.stale ? 'stale' : 'ready';
22999:             if (!cached.stale) return record.catalogue;
23000:         }
23001:         let entry = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(descriptor.key) || { value: cached?.value || null, retryAt: 0, promise: null, touchedAt: now };
23002:         if (entry.promise) {
23003:             entry.promise.finally(() => missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record));
23004:             return record.catalogue || null;
23005:         }
23006:         if (entry.retryAt > now) return record.catalogue || null;
23007:         const doc = record?.source?.ownerDocument || record?.candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || record?.candidate?.mount?.ownerDocument;
23008:         const view = doc?.defaultView || pageWindow;
23009:         const fetcher = typeof view?.fetch === 'function' ? view.fetch.bind(view) : typeof pageWindow.fetch === 'function' ? pageWindow.fetch.bind(pageWindow) : null;
23010:         const DOMParserCtor = view?.DOMParser || pageWindow.DOMParser;
23011:         if (!fetcher || typeof DOMParserCtor !== 'function') {
23012:             record.catalogueState = record.catalogue ? 'stale' : 'unavailable';
23013:             return record.catalogue || null;
23014:         }
23015:         record.catalogueState = record.catalogue ? 'stale' : 'loading';
23016:         const promise = Promise.resolve(fetcher(descriptor.url, { credentials: 'same-origin', headers: { Accept: 'text/html' } }))
23017:             .then(response => {
23018:                 if (!response || response.ok === false) throw new Error(`catalogue HTTP ${response?.status || 'failure'}`);
23019:                 return response.text();
23020:             })
23021:             .then(html => {
23022:                 const parsedDoc = new DOMParserCtor().parseFromString(String(html || ''), 'text/html');
23023:                 const catalogue = missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(parsedDoc, descriptor);
23024:                 missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheStore(descriptor.key, catalogue);
23025:                 if (!stillCurrent()) return null;
23026:                 record.catalogue = catalogue;
23027:                 record.catalogueState = 'ready';
23028:                 return catalogue;
23029:             })
23030:             .catch(error => {
23031:                 if (!stillCurrent()) return null;
23032:                 const fallback = missionRequirementsCatalogueFailureFallback(descriptor.key);
23033:                 const current = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(descriptor.key) || entry;
23034:                 current.retryAt = Date.now() + MISSION_REQUIREMENTS_CATALOGUE_RETRY_MS;
23035:                 current.promise = null;
23036:                 current.touchedAt = Date.now();
23037:                 missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.set(descriptor.key, current);
23038:                 record.catalogueError = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(error?.message || 'catalogue request failed', 160);
23039:                 if (fallback) {
23040:                     record.catalogue = { ...fallback.value, stale: true };
23041:                     record.catalogueState = 'stale';
23042:                     return record.catalogue;
23043:                 }
23044:                 record.catalogueState = 'error';
23045:                 return null;
23046:             })
23047:             .finally(() => { if (stillCurrent()) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record); });
23048:         entry.promise = promise;
23049:         entry.touchedAt = now;
23050:         missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.set(descriptor.key, entry);
23051:         return record.catalogue || null;
23052:     }
23053: 
23054:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue) {
23055:         if (!catalogue?.requirements?.length) return { state: 'unavailable', summary: 'No catalogue requirements available', issues: [] };
23056:         const baseline = new Map(catalogue.requirements.map(item => [item.key, Number(item.baseline ?? item.missing) || 0]));
23057:         const issues = [];
23058:         for (const live of parsed?.requirements || []) {
23059:             if (!baseline.has(live.key)) issues.push(`Live-only requirement: ${live.requirement}`);
23060:             else if ((Number(live.missing) || 0) > baseline.get(live.key)) issues.push(`Live quantity exceeds catalogue: ${live.requirement}`);
23061:         }
23062:         if (parsed?.unresolved?.length) issues.push(`${parsed.unresolved.length} unresolved live fragment${parsed.unresolved.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
23063:         return { state: issues.length ? 'mismatch' : 'compatible', summary: issues.length ? issues.join('; ') : 'Live requirements are compatible with the catalogue baseline', issues };
23064:     }

23066:     function missionRequirementsCataloguePanelHtml(catalogue) {
23067:         const rows = Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []);
23068:         const stale = catalogue?.stale === true;
23069:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => `<tr data-row-state="unresolved"><td>${escapeHtml(row.requirement)}</td><td data-label="Catalogue baseline">${escapeHtml(row.baselineText || String(row.baseline ?? row.missing ?? '?'))}</td></tr>`).join('');
23070:         const unresolved = Array.from(catalogue?.unresolved || []);
23071:         const unresolvedHtml = unresolved.length ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unmapped catalogue entries</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(`${item.label}: ${item.value}`)}</span>`).join('')}</div>` : '';
23072:         const note = stale
23073:             ? 'Using a cached official catalogue baseline because the latest catalogue request failed. Current outstanding requirements are unavailable.'
23074:             : 'Official MissionChief catalogue baseline only. Current outstanding requirements are unavailable, so do not treat these quantities as still needed.';
23075:         const title = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(catalogue?.title || '', 100);
23076:         const summary = `${stale ? 'Cached ' : ''}official baseline${title ? ` · ${title}` : ''}`;
23077:         const table = rows.length
23078:             ? `<table aria-label="MissionChief catalogue baseline requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Catalogue baseline</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>`
23079:             : '<div class="mcms-req-fallback"><span class="mcms-req-fallback-message">The official catalogue lists no fixed vehicle or personnel requirements for this mission.</span></div>';
23080:         return {
23081:             stateName: 'warning',
23082:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
23083:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body">${table}<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Baseline planning data</b><span>${escapeHtml(note)}</span></div>${unresolvedHtml}</div>`
23084:         };

23087:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueDiagnosticLines(record, parsed) {
23088:         const descriptor = record?.catalogueDescriptor || missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(record?.candidate);
23089:         const catalogue = record?.catalogue;

23094:             `- State: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(record?.catalogueState || 'not requested', 40)}`,
23095:             `- Definition ID: ${descriptor?.id ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23096:             `- Overlay index: ${descriptor?.overlayIndex ?? 'None'}`,
23097:             `- Path: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(descriptor?.path || '', 180) || 'Unavailable'}`,

23099:             `- Parsed catalogue rows: ${catalogue?.requirements?.length || 0}`,
23100:             `- Unmapped catalogue rows: ${catalogue?.unresolved?.length || 0}`,
23101:             `- Average credits: ${catalogue?.averageCredits ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23102:             `- Max patients: ${catalogue?.maxPatients ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
23103:             `- Mission variations: ${catalogue?.variations?.length || 0}`,
23104:             `- Live/catalogue comparison: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(comparison.summary, 500)}`,
23105:             ...(rows.length ? ['', 'Catalogue requirement summary:', ...rows] : []),
23106:             ''
23107:         ];
23108:     }

23111:     function missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(selectedUnits, respondingUnits, onSiteUnits) {
23112:         const claimed = new Set();
23113:         const keysFor = unit => {
23114:             const keys = [];
23115:             if (unit?.vehicleId >= 0) keys.push(`vehicle:${unit.vehicleId}`);
23116:             if (unit?.contributionKey && !String(unit.contributionKey).startsWith('element:')) keys.push(String(unit.contributionKey));
23117:             return keys;
23118:         };
23119:         const claim = units => Array.from(units || []).filter(unit => {
23120:             const keys = keysFor(unit);
23121:             if (keys.some(key => claimed.has(key))) return false;
23122:             keys.forEach(key => claimed.add(key));
23123:             return true;
23124:         });
23125:         const onSite = claim(onSiteUnits);
23126:         const responding = claim(respondingUnits);
23127:         const selected = claim(selectedUnits);
23128:         return { selected, responding, onSite };

23174:     function missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, node) {
23175:         let current = node;
23176:         while (current?.parentNode && current.parentNode !== root) current = current.parentNode;
23177:         return current?.parentNode === root ? current : node;
23178:     }

23180:     function missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(node, boundary = null) {
23181:         const unsafeTags = new Set(['TABLE', 'THEAD', 'TBODY', 'TFOOT', 'TR', 'TD', 'TH', 'COLGROUP']);
23182:         let current = node;
23183:         while (current && current !== boundary) {
23184:             if (unsafeTags.has(String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase())) return true;
23185:             current = current.parentNode;
23186:         }
23187:         return false;
23188:     }
23189: 
23190:     function missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, node) {
23191:         if (!root || !node) return null;
23192:         let target = node;
23193:         let current = node;
23194:         while (current && current !== root) {
23195:             if (String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase() === 'TABLE') target = current;
23196:             current = current.parentNode;
23197:         }
23198:         const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, target);
23199:         const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23200:         if (!parent || missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(parent, root?.parentNode || null)) {
23201:             return { root, parent: root, before: root.firstChild || null };
23202:         }
23203:         return { root, parent, before: block };
23204:     }
23205: 
23206:     function missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source = null) {
23207:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount;
23208:         if (!root) return null;
23209:         const native = root.matches?.('#missing_text') ? root : root.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
23210:         const explicit = native || (missionRequirementsExplicitSource(source) && source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') !== '1' ? source : null);
23211:         if (explicit?.parentNode) return missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(explicit.parentNode, root?.parentNode || null)
23212:             ? missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, explicit)
23213:             : { root, parent: explicit.parentNode, before: explicit };
23214:         const address = root.querySelector?.('#mission_address, [data-mission-address], .mission-address, .mission_address');
23215:         const title = root.querySelector?.('#mission_caption, #mission_name, [data-mission-title], .mission-title, .mission_caption, h1');
23216:         const header = address || title;
23217:         if (header) {
23218:             const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, header);
23219:             const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23220:             const siblings = Array.from(parent.children || []);
23221:             const index = siblings.indexOf(block);
23222:             return { root, parent, before: index >= 0 ? (siblings[index + 1] || null) : (block?.nextSibling || null) };
23223:         }
23224:         // Operational regions may load before the mission header during AJAX dispatch.
23225:         // They remain data sources only and are never valid panel hosts.
23226:         return null;
23227:     }

22962:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCacheLookup(key, now = Date.now()) {
22963:         const entry = missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.get(key);
22964:         if (!entry?.value) return null;
22965:         if (now > entry.staleUntil) {
22966:             missionRequirementsCatalogueCache.delete(key);
22967:             return null;
22968:         }
22969:         entry.touchedAt = now;
22970:         return { value: entry.value, stale: now > entry.expiresAt };
22971:     }

23054:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue) {
23055:         if (!catalogue?.requirements?.length) return { state: 'unavailable', summary: 'No catalogue requirements available', issues: [] };
23056:         const baseline = new Map(catalogue.requirements.map(item => [item.key, Number(item.baseline ?? item.missing) || 0]));
23057:         const issues = [];
23058:         for (const live of parsed?.requirements || []) {
23059:             if (!baseline.has(live.key)) issues.push(`Live-only requirement: ${live.requirement}`);
23060:             else if ((Number(live.missing) || 0) > baseline.get(live.key)) issues.push(`Live quantity exceeds catalogue: ${live.requirement}`);
23061:         }
23062:         if (parsed?.unresolved?.length) issues.push(`${parsed.unresolved.length} unresolved live fragment${parsed.unresolved.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
23063:         return { state: issues.length ? 'mismatch' : 'compatible', summary: issues.length ? issues.join('; ') : 'Live requirements are compatible with the catalogue baseline', issues };
23064:     }

23111:     function missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(selectedUnits, respondingUnits, onSiteUnits) {
23112:         const claimed = new Set();
23113:         const keysFor = unit => {
23114:             const keys = [];
23115:             if (unit?.vehicleId >= 0) keys.push(`vehicle:${unit.vehicleId}`);
23116:             if (unit?.contributionKey && !String(unit.contributionKey).startsWith('element:')) keys.push(String(unit.contributionKey));
23117:             return keys;
23118:         };
23119:         const claim = units => Array.from(units || []).filter(unit => {
23120:             const keys = keysFor(unit);
23121:             if (keys.some(key => claimed.has(key))) return false;
23122:             keys.forEach(key => claimed.add(key));
23123:             return true;
23124:         });
23125:         const onSite = claim(onSiteUnits);
23126:         const responding = claim(respondingUnits);
23127:         const selected = claim(selectedUnits);
23128:         return { selected, responding, onSite };
23129:     }

23131:     function missionRequirementsResolve(candidate, parsed, catalogue = null) { const rawSelectedUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'selected'); const rawRespondingUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'responding'); const rawOnSiteUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'onsite'); const buckets = missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(rawSelectedUnits, rawRespondingUnits, rawOnSiteUnits); const catalogueByKey = new Map(Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []).map(item => [item.key, item])); return parsed.requirements.map(requirement => { if (requirement.definition?.countable === false) return missionRequirementsUnknownCoverageRow(requirement); const condition = missionRequirementsDefinitionCondition(requirement.definition, candidate); if (condition !== true) { const unknown = missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false); const unresolvedRow = missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, unknown, unknown, unknown, unknown); return { ...unresolvedRow, conditionKnown: condition !== null, conditionMatched: false, uncertain: true, definitelyOpen: false, coverageKnown: false }; } let selected; let responding; let onSite; if (requirement.definition?.bar) { const selectedValue = missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, 'selected'); const respondingValue = missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, 'driving'); const onSiteMetrics = ['at_mission', 'on_site', 'onsite', 'arrived', 'actual']; const onSiteValue = onSiteMetrics.map(metric => missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, metric)).find(value => value !== null); selected = selectedValue === null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(selectedValue, selectedValue, true); responding = respondingValue === null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(respondingValue, respondingValue, true); onSite = onSiteValue === undefined ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(onSiteValue, onSiteValue, true); } else { selected = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.selected); responding = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.responding); onSite = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.onSite); } const catalogueRequirement = catalogueByKey.get(requirement.key); const baseline = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(catalogueRequirement?.baseline ?? catalogueRequirement?.missing); const patientKnown = requirement.patientDerived === true && requirement.patientCountKnown === true; const patientUnknown = requirement.patientDerived === true && requirement.patientCountKnown === false; const patientRequired = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(requirement.patientRequired) || 0) : null; const hasStatedRequirement = requirement.statedRequirement !== false; if (baseline !== null && hasStatedRequirement) { const inferredOnSite = Math.max(0, baseline - Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0)); if (inferredOnSite > onSite.min) { const inferredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : Math.max(onSite.max, inferredOnSite); onSite = missionRequirementsCapacity(inferredOnSite, inferredMax, onSite.known && inferredMax === inferredOnSite); } } const statedRequiredMin = hasStatedRequirement ? Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0) + onSite.min : 0; const statedRequiredMax = hasStatedRequirement ? (onSite.max === null ? null : Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0) + onSite.max) : 0; const fixedMinimum = Math.max(patientRequired ?? 0, baseline ?? 0, statedRequiredMin); let required; if (patientUnknown) { required = missionRequirementsCapacity(Math.max(baseline ?? 0, statedRequiredMin), null, false); } else if (patientKnown) { const possibleMaximum = statedRequiredMax === null ? null : Math.max(patientRequired, baseline ?? 0, statedRequiredMax); const exact = possibleMaximum !== null && possibleMaximum === fixedMinimum && (hasStatedRequirement ? onSite.known : true); required = missionRequirementsCapacity(fixedMinimum, possibleMaximum, exact); } else { const liveRequiredMin = statedRequiredMin; const liveRequiredMax = statedRequiredMax; required = baseline !== null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(Math.max(baseline, liveRequiredMin), Math.max(baseline, liveRequiredMin), true) : missionRequirementsCapacity(liveRequiredMin, liveRequiredMax, onSite.known && liveRequiredMax !== null && liveRequiredMin === liveRequiredMax); } const row = missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, selected, responding, onSite, required); if (patientUnknown) { row.covered = false; row.definitelyOpen = false; row.uncertain = true; row.coverageKnown = false; } const authorities = []; if (requirement.patientDerived) authorities.push('patients'); if (baseline !== null) authorities.push('catalogue'); if (hasStatedRequirement) authorities.push('live'); return { ...row, conditionKnown: true, conditionMatched: true, requirementAuthority: authorities.length ? authorities.join('+') : 'live-reconstructed' }; }); }
23132: 
23133:     function missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved) {
23134:         if (rows.some(row => row.definitelyOpen)) return 'danger';
23135:         if (rows.some(row => row.uncertain) || unresolved.length) return 'warning';
23136:         return rows.length ? 'success' : 'warning';
23137:     }
23138: 
23139:     function missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source) {
23140:         // MissionChief and LSSM both use the generic alert-missing-vehicles class.
23141:         // Only explicit LSSM ownership metadata may suppress the Toolkit panel.
23142:         const ownedSelector = [
23143:         '.alert-missing-vehicles[data-raw-html]',
23144:         '[data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]',
23145:             '[data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]'
23146:         ].join(', ');
23147:         const isLssmOwned = element => {
23148:         if (!element) return false;
23149:         const sharedAlert = Boolean(
23150:             element.matches?.('.alert-missing-vehicles')
23151:             || element.classList?.contains?.('alert-missing-vehicles')
23152:         );
23153:             const rawHtml = element.getAttribute?.('data-raw-html');
23154:             if (sharedAlert && rawHtml !== null && rawHtml !== undefined) return true;
23155:             return Boolean(
23156:                 element.matches?.('[data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]')
23157:                 || element.matches?.('[data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]')
23158:             );
23159:         };
23160: 
23161:         if (isLssmOwned(source)) return true;
23162:         const closestOwned = source?.closest?.(ownedSelector);
23163:         if (isLssmOwned(closestOwned)) return true;
23164:         return isLssmOwned(candidate?.root?.querySelector?.(ownedSelector));
23165:     }

23053: 
23054:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue) {
23055:         if (!catalogue?.requirements?.length) return { state: 'unavailable', summary: 'No catalogue requirements available', issues: [] };
23056:         const baseline = new Map(catalogue.requirements.map(item => [item.key, Number(item.baseline ?? item.missing) || 0]));
23057:         const issues = [];
23058:         for (const live of parsed?.requirements || []) {
23059:             if (!baseline.has(live.key)) issues.push(`Live-only requirement: ${live.requirement}`);
23060:             else if ((Number(live.missing) || 0) > baseline.get(live.key)) issues.push(`Live quantity exceeds catalogue: ${live.requirement}`);
23061:         }
23062:         if (parsed?.unresolved?.length) issues.push(`${parsed.unresolved.length} unresolved live fragment${parsed.unresolved.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
23063:         return { state: issues.length ? 'mismatch' : 'compatible', summary: issues.length ? issues.join('; ') : 'Live requirements are compatible with the catalogue baseline', issues };
23064:     }

23174:     function missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, node) {
23175:         let current = node;
23176:         while (current?.parentNode && current.parentNode !== root) current = current.parentNode;
23177:         return current?.parentNode === root ? current : node;
23178:     }

23180:     function missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(node, boundary = null) {
23181:         const unsafeTags = new Set(['TABLE', 'THEAD', 'TBODY', 'TFOOT', 'TR', 'TD', 'TH', 'COLGROUP']);
23182:         let current = node;
23183:         while (current && current !== boundary) {
23184:             if (unsafeTags.has(String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase())) return true;
23185:             current = current.parentNode;
23186:         }
23187:         return false;
23188:     }

23111:     function missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(selectedUnits, respondingUnits, onSiteUnits) {
23112:         const claimed = new Set();
23113:         const keysFor = unit => {
23114:             const keys = [];
23115:             if (unit?.vehicleId >= 0) keys.push(`vehicle:${unit.vehicleId}`);
23116:             if (unit?.contributionKey && !String(unit.contributionKey).startsWith('element:')) keys.push(String(unit.contributionKey));
23117:             return keys;
23118:         };
23119:         const claim = units => Array.from(units || []).filter(unit => {
23120:             const keys = keysFor(unit);
23121:             if (keys.some(key => claimed.has(key))) return false;
23122:             keys.forEach(key => claimed.add(key));
23123:             return true;
23124:         });
23125:         const onSite = claim(onSiteUnits);
23126:         const responding = claim(respondingUnits);
23127:         const selected = claim(selectedUnits);
23128:         return { selected, responding, onSite };

23191:         if (!root || !node) return null;
23192:         let target = node;
23193:         let current = node;
23194:         while (current && current !== root) {
23195:             if (String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase() === 'TABLE') target = current;
23196:             current = current.parentNode;
23197:         }
23198:         const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, target);
23199:         const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23200:         if (!parent || missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(parent, root?.parentNode || null)) {
23201:             return { root, parent: root, before: root.firstChild || null };
23202:         }
23203:         return { root, parent, before: block };

23206:     function missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source = null) {
23207:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) || candidate?.root || candidate?.mount;
23208:         if (!root) return null;
23209:         const native = root.matches?.('#missing_text') ? root : root.querySelector?.('#missing_text');
23210:         const explicit = native || (missionRequirementsExplicitSource(source) && source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') !== '1' ? source : null);
23211:         if (explicit?.parentNode) return missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(explicit.parentNode, root?.parentNode || null)
23212:             ? missionRequirementsPlacementBlock(root, explicit)
23213:             : { root, parent: explicit.parentNode, before: explicit };
23214:         const address = root.querySelector?.('#mission_address, [data-mission-address], .mission-address, .mission_address');
23215:         const title = root.querySelector?.('#mission_caption, #mission_name, [data-mission-title], .mission-title, .mission_caption, h1');
23216:         const header = address || title;
23217:         if (header) {
23218:             const block = missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, header);
23219:             const parent = block?.parentNode || root;
23220:             const siblings = Array.from(parent.children || []);
23221:             const index = siblings.indexOf(block);
23222:             return { root, parent, before: index >= 0 ? (siblings[index + 1] || null) : (block?.nextSibling || null) };
23223:         }
23224:         // Operational regions may load before the mission header during AJAX dispatch.
23225:         // They remain data sources only and are never valid panel hosts.
23226:         return null;
23227:     }

22554:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;
22555:         }
22556:         for (const attribute of attributes) {
22557:             const value = Number.parseInt(scope?.getAttribute?.(attribute), 10);
22558:             if (Number.isFinite(value) && value >= 0) return value;

22565:         }
22566:         return -1;

23496:     function missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(value, limit = 600) {
23497:         let text = Array.from(String(value ?? ''), ch => { const code = ch.charCodeAt(0); return code < 32 || code === 127 ? ' ' : ch; }).join('').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
23498:         text = text
23499:             .replace(/https?:\/\/(?:discord(?:app)?\.com\/api\/webhooks|[^\s/]+\/webhooks)\/\S+/gi, '[redacted webhook]')
23500:             .replace(/\b(?:csrf|authenticity|authorization|session|cookie|token|password|secret|api[_-]?key)\b\s*[:=]\s*[^\s,;]+/gi, match => `${match.split(/[:=]/)[0]}: [redacted]`)
23501:             .replace(/\b[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}\b/gi, '[redacted email]')
23502:             .replace(/-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}\s*[,/]\s*-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}/g, '[redacted coordinates]');
23503:         return text.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit));
23504:     }

23506:     function missionRequirementsTypeSummary(units) {
23507:         const counts = new Map();
23508:         for (const unit of units || []) if (Number.isFinite(unit?.typeId) && unit.typeId >= 0) counts.set(unit.typeId, (counts.get(unit.typeId) || 0) + 1);
23509:         return Array.from(counts.entries()).sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]).map(([type, count]) => `${type}×${count}`).join(', ') || 'None detected';
23510:     }

23727:     function scanMissionRequirementsWindows() {
23728:         if (runtime.destroyed || !missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
23729:         if (!state.missionRequirements) {
23730:             clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
23731:             return;
23732:         }
23733:         const activeSources = new Set();
23734:         const activeDocuments = new WeakSet();
23735:         for (const candidate of missionRequirementsWindowCandidates()) {
23736:             const source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) || missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate);
23737:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false) continue;
23738:             const doc = source.ownerDocument || candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || document;
23739:             if (!doc || activeDocuments.has(doc)) continue;
23740:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23741:             ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23742:             if (missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source)) {
23743:                 missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23744:                 continue;
23745:             }
23746:             activeSources.add(source);
23747:             missionRequirementsEnsureRecord({ ...candidate, source }, source);
23748:         }
23749:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) {
23750:             if (source.isConnected === false || !activeSources.has(source)) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23751:         }
23752:     }

23593:     function missionRequirementsFallbackHtml(kind) {
23594:         const loading = kind === 'loading';
23595:         const empty = kind === 'empty';
23596:         const message = loading ? 'Loading mission requirements…' : empty ? 'No outstanding requirements reported by MissionChief.' : 'Unable to pull mission requirements';
23597:         const summary = loading ? 'Loading' : empty ? 'No outstanding requirements' : 'Requirements unavailable';
23598:         const report = loading || empty ? '' : '<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button>';
23599:         return { stateName: 'warning', html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${summary}</span></div><div class="mcms-req-fallback"><span class="mcms-req-fallback-message">${message}</span>${report}</div>` };
23600:     }

23721:         missionRequirementsScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
23722:             missionRequirementsScanTimer = null;
23723:             scanMissionRequirementsWindows();

23727:     function scanMissionRequirementsWindows() {
23728:         if (runtime.destroyed || !missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
23729:         if (!state.missionRequirements) {
23730:             clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
23731:             return;
23732:         }
23733:         const activeSources = new Set();
23734:         const activeDocuments = new WeakSet();
23735:         for (const candidate of missionRequirementsWindowCandidates()) {
23736:             const source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) || missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate);
23737:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false) continue;
23738:             const doc = source.ownerDocument || candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || document;
23739:             if (!doc || activeDocuments.has(doc)) continue;
23740:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23741:             ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23742:             if (missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source)) {
23743:                 missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23744:                 continue;
23745:             }
23746:             activeSources.add(source);
23747:             missionRequirementsEnsureRecord({ ...candidate, source }, source);
23748:         }
23749:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) {
23750:             if (source.isConnected === false || !activeSources.has(source)) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23751:         }
23752:     }

23755:         for (const record of missionRequirementsRecords.values()) {
23756:             if (record.source?.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23757:         }
23758:     }

23761:         if (!frame || missionRequirementsObservedFrames.has(frame)) return;
23762:         missionRequirementsObservedFrames.add(frame);
23763:         const onLoad = () => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(20);
23764:         frame.addEventListener('load', onLoad);
23765:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => frame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad));
23766:     }

23054:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue) {
23055:         if (!catalogue?.requirements?.length) return { state: 'unavailable', summary: 'No catalogue requirements available', issues: [] };
23056:         const baseline = new Map(catalogue.requirements.map(item => [item.key, Number(item.baseline ?? item.missing) || 0]));
23057:         const issues = [];
23058:         for (const live of parsed?.requirements || []) {
23059:             if (!baseline.has(live.key)) issues.push(`Live-only requirement: ${live.requirement}`);
23060:             else if ((Number(live.missing) || 0) > baseline.get(live.key)) issues.push(`Live quantity exceeds catalogue: ${live.requirement}`);
23061:         }
23062:         if (parsed?.unresolved?.length) issues.push(`${parsed.unresolved.length} unresolved live fragment${parsed.unresolved.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
23063:         return { state: issues.length ? 'mismatch' : 'compatible', summary: issues.length ? issues.join('; ') : 'Live requirements are compatible with the catalogue baseline', issues };
23064:     }

23111:     function missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(selectedUnits, respondingUnits, onSiteUnits) {
23112:         const claimed = new Set();
23113:         const keysFor = unit => {
23114:             const keys = [];
23115:             if (unit?.vehicleId >= 0) keys.push(`vehicle:${unit.vehicleId}`);
23116:             if (unit?.contributionKey && !String(unit.contributionKey).startsWith('element:')) keys.push(String(unit.contributionKey));
23117:             return keys;
23118:         };
23119:         const claim = units => Array.from(units || []).filter(unit => {
23120:             const keys = keysFor(unit);
23121:             if (keys.some(key => claimed.has(key))) return false;
23122:             keys.forEach(key => claimed.add(key));
23123:             return true;
23124:         });
23125:         const onSite = claim(onSiteUnits);
23126:         const responding = claim(respondingUnits);
23127:         const selected = claim(selectedUnits);
23128:         return { selected, responding, onSite };
23129:     }

23111:     function missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(selectedUnits, respondingUnits, onSiteUnits) {
23112:         const claimed = new Set();
23113:         const keysFor = unit => {
23114:             const keys = [];
23115:             if (unit?.vehicleId >= 0) keys.push(`vehicle:${unit.vehicleId}`);
23116:             if (unit?.contributionKey && !String(unit.contributionKey).startsWith('element:')) keys.push(String(unit.contributionKey));
23117:             return keys;
23118:         };
23119:         const claim = units => Array.from(units || []).filter(unit => {
23120:             const keys = keysFor(unit);
23121:             if (keys.some(key => claimed.has(key))) return false;
23122:             keys.forEach(key => claimed.add(key));
23123:             return true;
23124:         });
23125:         const onSite = claim(onSiteUnits);
23126:         const responding = claim(respondingUnits);
23127:         const selected = claim(selectedUnits);
23128:         return { selected, responding, onSite };
23129:     }

23131:     function missionRequirementsResolve(candidate, parsed, catalogue = null) { const rawSelectedUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'selected'); const rawRespondingUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'responding'); const rawOnSiteUnits = missionRequirementsCollectUnits(candidate, 'onsite'); const buckets = missionRequirementsExclusiveUnitBuckets(rawSelectedUnits, rawRespondingUnits, rawOnSiteUnits); const catalogueByKey = new Map(Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []).map(item => [item.key, item])); return parsed.requirements.map(requirement => { if (requirement.definition?.countable === false) return missionRequirementsUnknownCoverageRow(requirement); const condition = missionRequirementsDefinitionCondition(requirement.definition, candidate); if (condition !== true) { const unknown = missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false); const unresolvedRow = missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, unknown, unknown, unknown, unknown); return { ...unresolvedRow, conditionKnown: condition !== null, conditionMatched: false, uncertain: true, definitelyOpen: false, coverageKnown: false }; } let selected; let responding; let onSite; if (requirement.definition?.bar) { const selectedValue = missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, 'selected'); const respondingValue = missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, 'driving'); const onSiteMetrics = ['at_mission', 'on_site', 'onsite', 'arrived', 'actual']; const onSiteValue = onSiteMetrics.map(metric => missionRequirementsProgressValue(candidate, requirement.definition.bar, metric)).find(value => value !== null); selected = selectedValue === null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(selectedValue, selectedValue, true); responding = respondingValue === null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(respondingValue, respondingValue, true); onSite = onSiteValue === undefined ? missionRequirementsCapacity(0, null, false) : missionRequirementsCapacity(onSiteValue, onSiteValue, true); } else { selected = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.selected); responding = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.responding); onSite = missionRequirementsAggregate(requirement, buckets.onSite); } const catalogueRequirement = catalogueByKey.get(requirement.key); const baseline = missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(catalogueRequirement?.baseline ?? catalogueRequirement?.missing); const patientKnown = requirement.patientDerived === true && requirement.patientCountKnown === true; const patientUnknown = requirement.patientDerived === true && requirement.patientCountKnown === false; const patientRequired = patientKnown ? Math.max(0, Number(requirement.patientRequired) || 0) : null; const hasStatedRequirement = requirement.statedRequirement !== false; if (baseline !== null && hasStatedRequirement) { const inferredOnSite = Math.max(0, baseline - Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0)); if (inferredOnSite > onSite.min) { const inferredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : Math.max(onSite.max, inferredOnSite); onSite = missionRequirementsCapacity(inferredOnSite, inferredMax, onSite.known && inferredMax === inferredOnSite); } } const statedRequiredMin = hasStatedRequirement ? Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0) + onSite.min : 0; const statedRequiredMax = hasStatedRequirement ? (onSite.max === null ? null : Math.max(0, Number(requirement.missing) || 0) + onSite.max) : 0; const fixedMinimum = Math.max(patientRequired ?? 0, baseline ?? 0, statedRequiredMin); let required; if (patientUnknown) { required = missionRequirementsCapacity(Math.max(baseline ?? 0, statedRequiredMin), null, false); } else if (patientKnown) { const possibleMaximum = statedRequiredMax === null ? null : Math.max(patientRequired, baseline ?? 0, statedRequiredMax); const exact = possibleMaximum !== null && possibleMaximum === fixedMinimum && (hasStatedRequirement ? onSite.known : true); required = missionRequirementsCapacity(fixedMinimum, possibleMaximum, exact); } else { const liveRequiredMin = statedRequiredMin; const liveRequiredMax = statedRequiredMax; required = baseline !== null ? missionRequirementsCapacity(Math.max(baseline, liveRequiredMin), Math.max(baseline, liveRequiredMin), true) : missionRequirementsCapacity(liveRequiredMin, liveRequiredMax, onSite.known && liveRequiredMax !== null && liveRequiredMin === liveRequiredMax); } const row = missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, selected, responding, onSite, required); if (patientUnknown) { row.covered = false; row.definitelyOpen = false; row.uncertain = true; row.coverageKnown = false; } const authorities = []; if (requirement.patientDerived) authorities.push('patients'); if (baseline !== null) authorities.push('catalogue'); if (hasStatedRequirement) authorities.push('live'); return { ...row, conditionKnown: true, conditionMatched: true, requirementAuthority: authorities.length ? authorities.join('+') : 'live-reconstructed' }; }); }

23133:     function missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved) {
23134:         if (rows.some(row => row.definitelyOpen)) return 'danger';
23135:         if (rows.some(row => row.uncertain) || unresolved.length) return 'warning';
23136:         return rows.length ? 'success' : 'warning';
23137:     }

23139:     function missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source) {
23140:         // MissionChief and LSSM both use the generic alert-missing-vehicles class.
23141:         // Only explicit LSSM ownership metadata may suppress the Toolkit panel.
23142:         const ownedSelector = [
23143:         '.alert-missing-vehicles[data-raw-html]',
23144:         '[data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]',
23145:             '[data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]'
23146:         ].join(', ');
23147:         const isLssmOwned = element => {
23148:         if (!element) return false;
23149:         const sharedAlert = Boolean(
23150:             element.matches?.('.alert-missing-vehicles')
23151:             || element.classList?.contains?.('alert-missing-vehicles')
23152:         );
23153:             const rawHtml = element.getAttribute?.('data-raw-html');
23154:             if (sharedAlert && rawHtml !== null && rawHtml !== undefined) return true;
23155:             return Boolean(
23156:                 element.matches?.('[data-lssm-enhanced-missing-vehicles]')
23157:                 || element.matches?.('[data-lssm-module="extendedCallWindow.enhancedMissingVehicles"]')
23158:             );
23159:         };
23160: 
23161:         if (isLssmOwned(source)) return true;
23162:         const closestOwned = source?.closest?.(ownedSelector);
23163:         if (isLssmOwned(closestOwned)) return true;
23164:         return isLssmOwned(candidate?.root?.querySelector?.(ownedSelector));
23165:     }

23174:     function missionRequirementsDirectChild(root, node) {
23175:         let current = node;
23176:         while (current?.parentNode && current.parentNode !== root) current = current.parentNode;
23177:         return current?.parentNode === root ? current : node;

23180:     function missionRequirementsPlacementHostUnsafe(node, boundary = null) {
23181:         const unsafeTags = new Set(['TABLE', 'THEAD', 'TBODY', 'TFOOT', 'TR', 'TD', 'TH', 'COLGROUP']);
23182:         let current = node;
23183:         while (current && current !== boundary) {
23184:             if (unsafeTags.has(String(current.tagName || '').toUpperCase())) return true;
23185:             current = current.parentNode;
23186:         }
23187:         return false;
23188:     }

23638:     function missionRequirementsBindPanel(p){if(!p||p.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-collapse-bound'))return;p.setAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-collapse-bound','1');p.addEventListener('click',e=>{const report=e.target?.closest?.('[data-mcms-report-mission]');if(report){const r=Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.values()).find(x=>x.panel===p);const url=missionRequirementsReportUrl(r,p.dataset.mcmsReportReason||'unresolved requirement text');const opened=pageWindow.open?.(url,'_blank','noopener,noreferrer');try{if(opened)opened.opener=null}catch(err){}return}const b=e.target?.closest?.('[data-mcms-requirements-collapse]');if(!b)return;const c=p.classList.toggle('mcms-collapsed');b.setAttribute('aria-expanded',String(!c));b.setAttribute('aria-label',c?'Expand mission requirements':'Collapse mission requirements');b.textContent=c?'⌄':'⌃'})}
23639:     function missionRequirementsEnsureRecord(candidate, source) {
23640:         let record = missionRequirementsRecords.get(source);
23641:         let panel = missionRequirementsCanonicalPanel(source, record?.panel?.isConnected ? record.panel : null);
23642:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23643:         const scopedCandidate = { ...candidate, root, mount: root };
23644:         const missionIdentity = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(scopedCandidate, source);
23645:         if (record && panel) {
23646:             if (record.missionIdentity && missionIdentity && record.missionIdentity !== missionIdentity) {
23647:                 record.catalogueRequestToken = (Number(record.catalogueRequestToken) || 0) + 1;
23648:                 record.catalogue = null;
23649:                 record.catalogueDescriptor = null;
23650:                 record.catalogueState = 'idle';
23651:                 record.startedAt = Date.now();
23652:                 if (record.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer);
23653:                 record.patientTransitionTimer = null;
23654:             }
23655:             record.missionIdentity = missionIdentity;
23656:             record.panel = panel;
23657:             record.candidate = scopedCandidate;
23658:             missionRequirementsPlacePanel(scopedCandidate, source, panel);
23659:             missionRequirementsBindPanel(panel);
23660:             missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23661:             return record;
23662:         }
23663:         if (record) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23664:         const doc = source.ownerDocument || document;
23665:         for (const [otherSource] of missionRequirementsRecords) {
23666:             if (otherSource !== source && otherSource.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(otherSource);
23667:         }
23668:         ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23669:         panel = missionRequirementsCanonicalPanel(source);
23670:         if (!panel) {
23671:             panel = doc.createElement('section');
23672:             panel.id = SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId;
23673:             panel.setAttribute('data-mcms-requirements-panel', '1');
23674:             panel.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Live mission requirements');
23675:         }
23676:         missionRequirementsPlacePanel(scopedCandidate, source, panel);
23677:         panel.dataset.mcmsTheme = state.uiTheme;
23678:         missionRequirementsBindPanel(panel);
23679:         record = { candidate: scopedCandidate, source, panel, startedAt: Date.now(), missionIdentity };
23680:         const Observer = doc.defaultView?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver || MutationObserver;
23681:         if (root && typeof Observer === 'function') {
23682:             record.observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new Observer(mutations => mutations.some(mutation => missionRequirementsMutationRelevant(record, mutation)) && missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record)));
23683:             record.observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true, attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['checked', 'class', 'style', 'vehicle_type_id', 'data-vehicle-type-id', 'data-vehicle_type_id', 'data-equipment-types', 'data-equipment-type', 'data-current-personnel', 'data-min-personnel', 'data-max-personnel', 'data-patient-count', 'data-patient-total', 'data-patients', 'patient_count', 'patients_count', 'tractive_vehicle_id', 'data-tractive-vehicle-id', 'trailer_id', 'data-trailer-id', 'sortvalue'] });
23684:         }
23685:         missionRequirementsRecords.set(source, record);
23686:         missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23687:         return record;
23688:     }
23689: 
23690:     function missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source) {
23691:         const record = missionRequirementsRecords.get(source);
23692:         if (!record) {
23693:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source);
23694:             if (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') source.remove?.();
23695:             return;
23696:         }
23697:         if (record.frame) runtimeCancelAnimationFrame(record.frame);
23698:         if (record.patientTransitionTimer) runtimeClearTimeout(record.patientTransitionTimer);
23699:         record.patientTransitionTimer = null;
23700:         runtimeUntrackObserver(record.observer);
23701:         try { record.panel?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
23702:         missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
23703:         if (record.source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') record.source.remove?.();
23704:         missionRequirementsRecords.delete(source);
23705:     }

23707:     function clearMissionRequirementsPanels() {
23708:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23709:         missionRequirementsPatientSnapshots.clear();
23710:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23711:             try {
23712:                 context.doc.querySelectorAll?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`).forEach(panel => panel.remove());
23713:                 context.doc.querySelectorAll?.('[data-mcms-requirements-source-hidden="1"]').forEach(missionRequirementsRestoreSource);
23714:                 context.doc.querySelectorAll?.('[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]').forEach(anchor => anchor.remove());
23715:             } catch (err) {}
23716:         }
23717:     }

23721:         missionRequirementsScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
23722:             missionRequirementsScanTimer = null;
23723:             scanMissionRequirementsWindows();
23724:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
23725:     }

23727:     function scanMissionRequirementsWindows() {
23728:         if (runtime.destroyed || !missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime()) return;
23729:         if (!state.missionRequirements) {
23730:             clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
23731:             return;
23732:         }
23733:         const activeSources = new Set();
23734:         const activeDocuments = new WeakSet();
23735:         for (const candidate of missionRequirementsWindowCandidates()) {
23736:             const source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate(candidate) || missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate);
23737:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false) continue;
23738:             const doc = source.ownerDocument || candidate?.root?.ownerDocument || document;
23739:             if (!doc || activeDocuments.has(doc)) continue;
23740:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
23741:             ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
23742:             if (missionRequirementsLssmActive(candidate, source)) {
23743:                 missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23744:                 continue;
23745:             }
23746:             activeSources.add(source);
23747:             missionRequirementsEnsureRecord({ ...candidate, source }, source);
23748:         }
23749:         for (const source of Array.from(missionRequirementsRecords.keys())) {
23750:             if (source.isConnected === false || !activeSources.has(source)) missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source);
23751:         }
23752:     }

23755:         for (const record of missionRequirementsRecords.values()) {
23756:             if (record.source?.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
23757:         }
23758:     }

23776:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);

23786:                 if (mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, activitySelector)) return true;

23795:     }

23824: 
23825:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
23826:         let total = 0;
23827:         let known = 0;
23828:         let unknown = 0;
23829:         let eligible = 0;
23830:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
23831:         const sources = new Map();
23832:         for (const entry of entries) {
23833:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
23834:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
23835:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
23836:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
23837:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
23838:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
23839:             const value = details.value;
23840:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
23841:                 unknown += 1;
23842:                 continue;
23843:             }
23844:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
23845:             known += 1;
23846:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
23847:         }
23848:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
23849:     }
23850:

23852:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
23853:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
23854:     }

23858:     }

23862:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
23863:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
23864:     }

23229:     function missionRequirementsPlacePanel(candidate, source, panel) {
23230:         const placement = missionRequirementsPlacement(candidate, source);
23231:         if (!placement?.parent || !panel) return false;
23232:         const siblings = Array.from(placement.parent.children || []);
23233:         const panelIndex = siblings.indexOf(panel);
23234:         const beforeIndex = placement.before ? siblings.indexOf(placement.before) : siblings.length;
23235:         if (panel.parentNode !== placement.parent || panelIndex < 0 || panelIndex !== beforeIndex - 1) {
23236:             placement.parent.insertBefore?.(panel, placement.before || null);
23237:         }
23238:         return true;
23239:     }

23272:     function missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate(candidate) {

23276:             || root.querySelector?.('[data-mcms-requirements-anchor="1"]');

23292:     function missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate) {
23293:         const missionSelector = '#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content, .mission_content, [data-mission-content]';
23294:         const windowSelector = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-body, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
23295:         const nodes = [candidate?.source, candidate?.root, candidate?.mount].filter(Boolean);
23296:         const missionWithin = node => {
23297:             if (!node) return null;
23298:             if (node.matches?.(missionSelector)) return node;
23299:             const closest = node.closest?.(missionSelector);
23300:             if (closest) return closest;
23301:             return node.querySelector?.(missionSelector) || null;
23302:         };
23303:         for (const node of nodes) {
23304:             const mission = missionWithin(node);
23305:             if (mission) return mission;
23306:         }
23307:         for (const node of nodes) {
23308:             const windowRoot = node.matches?.(windowSelector) ? node : node.closest?.(windowSelector);
23309:             if (windowRoot) return missionWithin(windowRoot) || windowRoot;
23310:         }
23311:         for (const node of nodes) {
23312:             try {
23313:                 const frame = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || null;
23314:                 if (!frame) continue;
23315:                 const frameMission = missionWithin(frame);
23316:                 if (frameMission) return frameMission;
23317:                 const frameWindow = frame.matches?.(windowSelector) ? frame : frame.closest?.(windowSelector);
23318:                 if (frameWindow) return missionWithin(frameWindow) || frameWindow;
23319:             } catch (err) {}
23320:         }
23321:         return candidate?.root || candidate?.mount || candidate?.source || null;
23322:     }

23324:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23325:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23326:         if (!root?.querySelector) return false;
23327:         if (missionRequirementsMissionIdentity({ ...candidate, root }, missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root })) > 0) return true;
23328:         if (root.matches?.('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) return true;
23329:         return Boolean(root.querySelector('#vehicle_show_table_body_all, #mission_vehicle_driving, .vehicle_checkbox, [mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id]'));

23333:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));

23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;

23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)

23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();

23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });

23324:     function missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow(candidate) {
23325:         const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23326:         if (!root?.querySelector) return false;
23327:         if (missionRequirementsMissionIdentity({ ...candidate, root }, missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root })) > 0) return true;
23328:         if (root.matches?.('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) return true;
23329:         return Boolean(root.querySelector('#vehicle_show_table_body_all, #mission_vehicle_driving, .vehicle_checkbox, [mission_type_id], [data-mission-type-id]'));
23330:     }
23331: 
23332:     function missionRequirementsPrimaryRuntime(){try{return!pageWindow.top||pageWindow.top===pageWindow}catch{return true}}
23333:     function missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate,source){const r=candidate?.root,l=r?.querySelector?.('a[href*="/missions/"],form[action*="/missions/"]');for(const v of[candidate?.missionId,candidate?.mission_id,r?.dataset?.missionId,r?.getAttribute?.('mission_id'),r?.getAttribute?.('action'),l?.getAttribute?.('href'),l?.getAttribute?.('action'),source?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.location?.pathname]){const m=String(v??'').match(/(?:\/missions\/|mission[_-]?)(\d+)|^(\d+)$/i),id=+(m?.[1]||m?.[2]);if(id>0)return id}return 0}
23334:     function missionRequirementsWindowCandidates() {
23335:         const candidates = [];
23336:         const seenSources = new Set();
23337:         const seenRoots = new Set();
23338:         const add = (candidate, trusted = false) => {
23339:             const root = missionRequirementsCandidateRoot(candidate);
23340:             if (!root || seenRoots.has(root)) return;
23341:             let source = missionRequirementsSourceForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23342:             if (!source) {
23343:                 if (!trusted && !missionRequirementsLooksLikeWindow({ ...candidate, root, mount: root })) return;
23344:                 source = missionRequirementsAnchorForCandidate({ ...candidate, root, mount: root });
23345:             }
23346:             if (!source || source.isConnected === false || seenSources.has(source)) return;
23347:             seenRoots.add(root);
23348:             seenSources.add(source);
23349:             candidates.push({ ...candidate, root, mount: root, source });
23350:         };
23351:         missionValueWindowCandidates().forEach(candidate => add(candidate, true));
23352:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) {
23353:             const doc = context?.doc;
23354:             if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) continue;
23355:             for (const source of doc.querySelectorAll('#missing_text')) add(missionRequirementsCandidateFromSource(source), true);
23356:             for (const root of doc.querySelectorAll('#mission_form, form[action*="/missions/"], #mission_content')) add({ root, mount: root }, false);
23357:         }
23358:         const priority = candidate => {
23359:             const source = candidate?.source;
23360:             return (isVisible(candidate?.root) ? 100 : 0)
23361:                 + (source?.id === 'missing_text' || source?.matches?.('#missing_text') ? 20 : 0)
23362:                 + (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1' ? 0 : 5)
23363:                 + (missionRequirementsRecords.has(source) ? 1 : 0);
23364:         };
23365:         const missionIds = new Set();
23366:         return candidates.sort((left, right) => priority(right) - priority(left)).filter(candidate => {
23367:             const missionId = missionRequirementsMissionIdentity(candidate, candidate.source);
23368:             if (!missionId) return true;
23369:             if (missionIds.has(missionId)) return false;
23370:             missionIds.add(missionId);
23371:             return true;
23372:         });
23373:     }

23454:     function missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows = [], unresolved = []) {
23455:         const labels = Array.from(rows || []).map(row => String(row?.requirement || row?.catalogueLabel || row?.label || ''));
23456:         const fragments = Array.from(unresolved || []).map(item => String(item?.text || [item?.label, item?.value].filter(Boolean).join(': ') || item || ''));
23457:         const longestLabel = labels.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23458:         const longestFragment = fragments.reduce((maximum, value) => Math.max(maximum, value.length), 0);
23459:         if (longestLabel > 62 || longestFragment > 150) return 'fluid';
23460:         if (longestLabel > 32 || longestFragment > 72) return 'wide';
23461:         return 'standard';
23462:     }

23464:     function missionRequirementsPanelHtml(rows, unresolved) {
23465:         const definiteOutstanding = rows.filter(row => row.definitelyOpen).length;
23466:         const uncertain = rows.filter(row => row.uncertain).length + unresolved.length;
23467:         const fulfilled = rows.filter(row => row.covered).length;
23468:         const stateName = missionRequirementsOverallState(rows, unresolved);
23469:         const summary = stateName === 'success'
23470:             ? `All ${rows.length} covered`
23471:             : stateName === 'warning'
23472:                 ? `${uncertain} need confirmation · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`
23473:                 : `${definiteOutstanding} outstanding · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`;
23474:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => {
23475:             const rowState = row.covered ? 'covered' : row.uncertain ? 'unresolved' : row.partial ? 'partial' : 'open';
23476:             const prefix = row.covered ? '✓ ' : '';
23477:             const requiredText = row.requiredText || (Number.isFinite(Number(row.missing)) ? Number(row.missing).toLocaleString('en-GB') : '?');
23478:             const onSiteText = row.onSiteText || '?';
23479:             const respondingText = row.respondingText || row.enRouteText || '?';
23480:             const selectedText = row.selectedText || '?';
23481:             const stillText = row.stillNeededText || '?';
23482:             const status = row.covered ? 'fulfilled' : row.uncertain ? 'requires confirmation' : row.partial ? 'partially fulfilled' : 'outstanding';
23483:             const sourceBadge = row.requirementSource ? `<small class="mcms-req-source">${escapeHtml(row.requirementSource)}</small>` : '';
23484:             return `<tr data-row-state="${rowState}" title="${escapeHtml(`${row.requirement}: ${status}`)}"><td><span>${escapeHtml(prefix + row.requirement)}</span>${sourceBadge}</td><td data-label="Required">${escapeHtml(requiredText)}</td><td data-label="On site">${escapeHtml(onSiteText)}</td><td data-label="Respond.">${escapeHtml(respondingText)}</td><td data-label="Selected">${escapeHtml(selectedText)}</td><td class="mcms-req-still" data-label="Need">${escapeHtml(stillText)}</td></tr>`;
23485:         }).join('');
23486:         const unknownHtml = unresolved.length
23487:             ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unresolved MissionChief requirement</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(item.text)}</span>`).join('')}<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button></div>`
23488:             : '';
23489:         return {
23490:             stateName,
23491:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
23492:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body"><table aria-label="Live mission requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Required</th><th scope="col">On site</th><th scope="col">Responding</th><th scope="col">Selected</th><th scope="col">Still needed</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>${unknownHtml}</div>`
23493:         };
23494:     }

22810:                 const href = String(link.getAttribute?.('href') || link.href || '');
22811:                 const match = href.match(/\/einsaetze\/(\d+)(?:\?[^#]*\boverlay_index=(\d+))?/iu);
22812:                 if (!match) continue;
22813:                 matched = { id: Number(match[1]), overlayIndex: match[2] === undefined ? null : Number(match[2]) };
22814:                 break;
22815:             }
22816:             if (matched) break;
22817:         }
22818:         if (!matched) {

22821:             matched = { id: Number(id), overlayIndex: null };

22826:         const path = `/einsaetze/${matched.id}${matched.overlayIndex === null ? '' : `?overlay_index=${matched.overlayIndex}`}`;
22827:         return { ...matched, origin, path, url: `${origin}${path}`, key: `${origin}${path}` };

22830:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value) {
22831:         const rawLabel = missionRequirementsCatalogueText({ textContent: label });
22832:         const rawValue = missionRequirementsCatalogueText({ textContent: value });
22833:         const quantityMatch = rawValue.match(/^\s*(\d+(?:[\s,.]\d{3})*)/u);
22834:         const quantity = quantityMatch ? missionRequirementsNumber(quantityMatch[1]) : null;
22835:         if (quantity === null) return null;
22836:         const cleanedLabel = rawLabel
22837:             .replace(/^(?:required|requirement\s+of|needed)\s+/iu, '')
22838:             .replace(/\s*\([^)]*%[^)]*\)\s*$/u, '')
22839:             .trim();
22840:         if (!cleanedLabel) return null;
22841:         const probabilityMatch = `${rawLabel} ${rawValue}`.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*%/u);
22842:         const probability = probabilityMatch ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(probabilityMatch[1]))) : 100;
22843:         const sourceText = `${quantity} ${cleanedLabel}`;
22844:         for (const group of ['vehicles', 'staff', 'other']) {
22845:             const parsed = missionRequirementsParseText(sourceText, group);
22846:             if (!parsed.requirements.length) continue;
22847:             const requirement = parsed.requirements[0];
22848:             return {
22849:                 ...requirement,
22850:                 missing: quantity,
22851:                 baseline: quantity,
22852:                 baselineText: `${quantity.toLocaleString('en-GB')}${probability < 100 ? ` (${probability}% chance)` : ''}`,
22853:                 probability,
22854:                 catalogueLabel: rawLabel,
22855:                 catalogueValue: rawValue,
22856:                 catalogueKnown: true
22857:             };
22858:         }
22859:         const inferredGroup = missionRequirementsInferGroup(cleanedLabel, 'vehicles');
22860:         const key = `catalogue-${cleanedLabel.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gu, '-').replace(/^-|-$/gu, '').slice(0, 70) || 'unknown'}`;
22861:         return {
22862:             key,
22863:             requirement: cleanedLabel,
22864:             missing: quantity,
22865:             baseline: quantity,
22866:             baselineText: `${quantity.toLocaleString('en-GB')}${probability < 100 ? ` (${probability}% chance)` : ''}`,
22867:             probability,
22868:             group: inferredGroup,
22869:             definition: { key, label: cleanedLabel, aliases: [cleanedLabel], group: inferredGroup, types: [], equipment: [], factors: {}, countable: false },
22870:             catalogueLabel: rawLabel,
22871:             catalogueValue: rawValue,
22872:             catalogueKnown: false
22873:         };
22874:     }

22876:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueParseDocument(doc, descriptor = {}) {
22877:         if (!doc?.querySelectorAll) throw new Error('catalogue document unavailable');
22878:         const requirements = [];
22879:         const unresolved = [];
22880:         const preconditions = {};
22881:         const other = {};
22882:         const tables = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('table') || []);
22883:         for (const table of tables) {
22884:             const tableText = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(table);
22885:             let kind = /Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements/iu.test(tableText) ? 'requirements'
22886:                 : /Reward\s+and\s+Precondition/iu.test(tableText) ? 'preconditions'
22887:                     : /Other\s+information/iu.test(tableText) ? 'other' : null;
22888:             const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll?.('tr') || []);
22889:             for (const row of rows) {
22890:                 const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll?.('th, td') || []);
22891:                 if (cells.length < 2) continue;
22892:                 const label = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[0]);
22893:                 const value = missionRequirementsCatalogueText(cells[1]);
22894:                 if (!label || /^(?:Value|Vehicle\s+and\s+Personnel\s+Requirements|Reward\s+and\s+Precondition|Other\s+information)$/iu.test(label)) continue;
22895:                 if (!kind && /^(?:Required|Requirement\s+of|Needed)\b/iu.test(label)) kind = 'requirements';
22896:                 if (kind === 'requirements') {
22897:                     const parsed = missionRequirementsCatalogueRequirement(label, value);
22898:                     if (parsed) requirements.push(parsed);
22899:                     else unresolved.push({ label, value });
22900:                 } else if (kind === 'preconditions') {
22901:                     preconditions[label] = value;
22902:                 } else if (kind === 'other') {
22903:                     other[label] = value;
22904:                 }
22905:             }
22906:         }
22907:         const titleNode = doc.querySelector?.('h1, [data-mission-title], .mission-title');

22909:         const variationLinks = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/einsaetze/"]') || []);
22910:         const seenVariations = new Set();
22911:         const variations = [];
22912:         for (const link of variationLinks) {
22913:             const href = String(link.getAttribute?.('href') || link.href || '');
22914:             if (!/\/einsaetze\/\d+/u.test(href) || seenVariations.has(href)) continue;
22915:             seenVariations.add(href);
22916:             variations.push({ href: missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(href, 180), title: missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(missionRequirementsCatalogueText(link), 140) });
22917:         }
22918:         const findValue = (source, pattern) => {
22919:             const entry = Object.entries(source).find(([key]) => pattern.test(key));
22920:             return entry ? entry[1] : '';
22921:         };
22922:         return {
22923:             id: descriptor.id ?? null,
22924:             overlayIndex: descriptor.overlayIndex ?? null,
22925:             path: descriptor.path || '',
22926:             url: descriptor.url || '',
22927:             title,
22928:             requirements,
22929:             unresolved,
22930:             preconditions,
22931:             other,
